For years, Grand Gaming Technologies Private Limited (GGTPL) has been a leader in virtual entertainment. But rumors have started to circulate on the dark web—rumors of people going missing near their remote "Logistics Center" hidden deep in the forest. They call it Sector 4.

You are a whistleblower who has received a cryptic coordinate. Armed with only a flashlight and a camera, you must infiltrate the decaying industrial complex to find out what GGTPL is really building.

But the factory isn't abandoned. The machinery is still humming, the security protocols are active, and something horrifying is stalking the assembly lines.

Investigate. Survive. Expose

name: Carrot Overload
summary:
our young rabbit hero travel without goal to the green area.the middle land of the rabbit territory is known for being at peace. But it is no longer the fact today.

it is time adorable hero to explore and give a good pawn in the slimes.

trials are stacking, hopes are increasing !

become the hope they deeply need.

name: Guerilla Cinema // Guerilla Theater
summary: A comedy horror indie visual novel about an experimented on silverback gorilla that escapes from a research facility and breaks into a movie theater. The player has to choose between three different items to stop the gorilla and whatever item they choose determines what ending they get.

name: Tilde and the 9 Mystical Glorbos
summary: You follow Tilde, an average 20-year-old guy living a humdrum life on his own. When one day word spreads of a cluster of so-called "meteorites" that came from the sky in the middle of the night. With nothing better to do he decides to check it out. If only he knew what he would set in motion...

name: The Narrator Says We're Meant to Be!
summary:
A sweet and comedic love story where you romance Julian, the most popular guy around, while also dealing with an opinionated and tsundere Narrator trying to give you advice on how to reach your happy ending.

Will you succeed, comically mess up, or... fall for someone who wasn't supposed to be a character in the first place?

name: Super Holo Wars
summary:
Super Holo Wars is about one simple concept: Take the members of Hololive, put them into giant robots and give them a world to play around in.

Super Holo Wars offers a full-length SRPG experience covering the first part of a two-chapter story. Join the members of Hololive as they embark on their quest to protect two worlds from an Alien invasion and the Noise

name: The Black Whale
summary: The factory chip began to malfunction. Your horrible headaches don’t bother anyone in this dystopian world. “Black Whale”, the attractive white powder, is the only thing that can stop the pain. And show you the life without the horrors of harsh reality.

name: Kicking Upwards
summary: Kicking Upwards is an experimental, skill-based physics game where you kick a red ball up a mountain.

name: SketchCode
summary: SketchCode is an online multiplayer party game where players draw and guess words in team-based matches. Players can create private rooms, customize teams and rounds, add custom words, and compete under time limits by explaining terms through drawings while following the game rules.

name: Faye's Garden
summary: Here, in this verdant embassy, Faye opens her arms, and legs, to you. So, don't forget take a deep breath, savor the magic in the air, and get ready to experience the beautiful land of Ithonia!

name: Happy Harvest
summary: A cozy themed, idle incremental farming game.

name: Draft Day Sports: College Basketball 26
summary: Build your college basketball dynasty in Draft Day Sports: College Basketball 26. Recruit elite talent, manage NIL strategy, dominate the transfer portal, and guide your team through March. The deepest and most realistic college basketball simulation yet.

name: Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain
summary: Your Virtual Vacation Awaits

name: Penguin
summary: Fish, sell, upgrade, and dive ever deeper into an ocean full of secrets. Collect the entire ARTICDEX!

name: Coloring Pixels: Natural Wonders
summary: This Natural Wonders book unlocks 20 additional levels for Coloring Pixels. Each image shows a different natural wonder from our beautiful green-and-blue planet! See the wonders of the natural world in this book!

name: Flash Knight Nymphelia
summary: A selfie-obsessed-girl-turned-transforming-heroine fights against an evil organization in a powered suit fueled with her stress from hiding her true self from public!

name: Beyond the Eyes
summary: A 2d game with a view from above, where you are in the shoes of a blind protagonist and have to find a way to escape from a mansion by collecting various items scattered around it at random while being chased by a monster.

name: Trade Empire
summary: Trade Empire is a medieval trade strategy simulation game. Create your merchant, start trading in your chosen city, and use diplomatic moves to take control of trade across the entire map and eliminate your rivals.

name: Find 100 Ducks and Blast Them...in Space!!!
summary: Yes! In this game you must blast 100 toy ducks...IN SPACE! Relax, take aim, and let the feathers fly! With light-hearted gameplay and cute ducks to hunt, it's a casual first-person experience full of wholesome, family-friendly fun!

name: Night of Nightmare
summary: Every night, the nightmare comes. Your room is no longer safe... The moment you lie down on a strange bed and close your eyes, you are no longer alone. Is this reality? Or are you inside someone else’s nightmare?

name: Exercise Your Demons
summary: Step into the world of Exercise your Demons, a 2d narrative adventure inspired by Irish fairies and folklore. Meet and befriend 5 locals while you work towards settling into the small fictional town called Inishsióg in County Galway, Ireland.

name: Topobeam
summary: Topobeam is a puzzle game about redirecting lasers in different two-dimensional manifolds. The levels operate on a grid system, but pay attention to how the sides of the grid are glued together as players, objects, and lasers can cross over these gluings to different parts of the level.

name: Sidyq
summary: Sidyq combines monster collection with dynamic turn-based battles. Unleash your tactical creativity and face formidable bosses in a strategic RPG where every decision can change the outcome of the fight.

name: Don't Crack!
summary: A chaotic co-op or solo rage platformer about a fragile egg’s dangerous journey back to its nest.

name: Cyber Saber Pro
summary: Become HKKMR-U, the legendary Cyborg Samurai, and test your reflexes in a fast-paced arcade hack-and-slash survival game. Stand your ground, unleash your sword skills, and face wave after wave of mechanical enemies inspired by Japanese folklore.

name: Insanio
summary: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

name: Viral Hunters
summary: You are trapped in the same facility, aiming to find a way out through the scattered "Vaccine Injectors". The game's core revolves around the crucial vaccines.

name: Omoide Cafe
summary: Omoide Cafe is a calm café/pastry shop simulation where you develop your own café step by step, unlocking new recipes, equipment, and features with the guidance of Bebii.

name: Phantom the Huntress
summary: Not sword-clanging trash. Not glitter-magic garbage. Bow only. The rest is for peasants. I’m Phantom, elite huntress, eternally exhausted. You’ll track, gather, goblin-slay, babysit dumb NPCs and rank up at snail pace. Wishlist now. I get bonus wine money. Do it or vanish. My patience is dead.

name: Everfall 2: Idle Dungeon RPG
summary: Unique Bosses, Loot Filters, Combat Pets, & Pick Your Team of 4 to Customize with Skill trees, Keystones, Abilities, and Runes in a MASSIVE ENDGAME!

name: Akunin-Akka
summary: An interrogation game where you play as the detective in charge of a case and interrogate suspects to uncover the truth behind the bombing. Uncover the weaknesses of the unique suspects and get to the bottom of the case!

name: I am Slime
summary: Memory backtracking, as one puzzle after another is solved, the memories of the blue slime are also turned over page by page ..

name: Duck the Miner
summary: Duck the Miner is a 2D mining game, where you control a little duck, that unfortunately has a huge debt. To pay it off, you were contracted by a greedy company to embark on missions across space, collecting resources to help restore Earth from its devastating past.

name: Today's Menu
summary: Mix cards with restaurant management in this sim game. Build, gather ingredients, and learn recipes. Use your deck to serve customers, earn profits and fame, then upgrade and expand to craft your ideal restaurant.

name: The Dead Roam Free
summary:
Play Snake as you’ve never played it before.

In The Dead Roam Free, you slither, shoot, and snack your way through a twisted military experiment gone wrong. Blood, betrayal, and bad jokes are all part of the package.

You are Bob Segatti, private eye and fixer for those who can pay. When a mysterious dame walks into his office, Bob bites off more than he can chew — literally. One betrayal and a concrete floor later, he wakes up undead and hungry for answers.

Crawl through labs, streets, and sewers in a top-down action-puzzle adventure where every meal makes you longer, stronger, and dumber. Uncover the truth behind the army’s secret zombie program, rescue the girl, and get revenge — one bite at a time.

name: WWE 2K26
summary: The show never stops in WWE 2K26! Step into CM Punk’s 2K Showcase, dominate with 400+ Superstars and Legends, and unleash chaos with all-new match types.

name: Tiny Biomes: Cozy Idle
summary: Tiny Biomes is a relaxing idle game where animals peacefully produce resources and you gather wood in a tranquil harvesting area. Build small biomes, earn gold, and enjoy steady progress without pressure, timers, or stress. Play at your own pace and unwind.

name: Out of the Park Baseball 27
summary: 27 years of sports gaming excellence! Out of the Park Baseball 27 is here - officially licensed by MLB, the MLB Players Inc. and KBO! This year's brand new version puts you firmly in charge of your favorite baseball franchise or country. Your team, your way, your rules.

name: Next Patient
summary: During a pandemic, you are a medical distribution officer at a controlled checkpoint. Review IDs, medical reports, and blood tests; approve or deny requests. Supplies are limited. Procedures are strict. The decision is yours.

name: Darkrite: The Blight of Love
summary: Old school, rich with lore, and made with love. Experience a linear gothic story with carefully handwritten prose. Play either as an action RPG or visual novel. Your Weaver journey starts here.

name: Mazy
summary: MAZY is a first-person PS1-style horror game where you explore procedurally generated mazes, solve a variety of minigames and survive while hostile clowns hunt you down. Collect coins to buy power-ups and assistance to help you escape.

name: UltiMage
summary: Rogue-lite, magic based combat system. A lighter dark fantasy about a person "iseaki" 'ed to another world.

name: Droste Detective
summary: You're stuck in an office corridor with no exit that has a painting of the same corridor on the wall. But then you notice the corridor in the painting is not quite the same. You decide to inspect the painting...

name: Scission
summary: Scission is a dark and gruesome action game where you control two characters at once. Fight grotesque representations of the subconscious, master new skills and explore the depth of the human mind in this singleplayer game.

name: Desktop Aquarium
summary: A relaxing mini aquarium that stays on your desktop corner while you do other stuff — collect fish, upgrade tanks, and enjoy a cozy idle experience.

name: End of Garbage
summary: A darkened sky. A blazing fire. A wretched tombstone. And you, here at the end of everything. End of Garbage is a short, first-person puzzle game exploring the dark surreality of endings.

name: Recursive
summary: Incrementals layered inside of an incremental. Click your way through waves of enemies to grow and defend your kingdom. Unlock a bunch of minigames with different mechanics and bonuses along the way! Can you defeat the final boss and reclaim the throne?!

name: Drill and Delve
summary: You've been trapped in a mine. You'll need to use your tools to dig your way to the exit in a fully destructible 3D voxel terrain. Manage your oxygen and equipment, and uncover the dark mystery buried deep within the mine.

name: Echo Factory
summary: The world has gone silent. Tap into the void, generate echoes, and automate the restoration of sound in this neon-soaked, sci-fi idle game. Build powerful machines, unlock complex frequencies, and rebuild the cosmic core to bring harmony back to the universe.

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Thea: Canyne Ward
summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Thea: Canyne Ward Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Relaxed-acabra
summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Relaxed-acabra Change Rudy's look with outfits!

name: Völund
summary: The forge remembers every strike. In VÖLUND, a blacksmithing roguelike, you shape raw ore into weapons of legend. Unearth cursed metals, master the ancient craft, and forge your path to immortality.

name: Teko
summary: Teko is an Indie Roguelike Deckbuilder where you have to reach the highest possible score by playing Poker hands, but in an unconventional way: making 3 combos at once.

name: Caribbean Legend: Age of Pirates
summary: You are the captain and owner of your own ship—the finest fate one could hope for in the 17th century Caribbean. Unlimited sandbox experience. A unique genre blending naval combat, land exploration, and global map. Think Sid Meier's Pirates! meets Bannerlord.

name: Cat Familiar Center
summary: Cat Familiar Center is a relaxing cat-raising game. Players will play as a witch and, with the help of fellow witches, train different cat familiars and find suitable new homes for them.

name: Summer Delicous Simulator
summary: Start your career on the bustling city streets as an ice cream or hotdog vendor! Upgrade your cart, outsmart your rivals, and compete with friends to become the most popular seller in town!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Special Outfits Set
summary: This set includes recommended downloadable content. Contents: * Special Outfits Set

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Rudyzeno
summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Rudyzeno Change Rudy's look with outfits!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Scintillating Armor
summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Scintillating Armor Change Rudy's look with outfits!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Shogun Rudy
summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Shogun Rudy Change Rudy's look with outfits!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Rudy's Arkbelt
summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Rudy's Arkbelt Change Rudy's look with outfits!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Ogden: Summertime Ogden
summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Ogden: Summertime Ogden Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Gaul: Fur-tive Five Leader
summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Gaul: Fur-tive Five Leader Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Kora: Attendant's Attire
summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Kora: Attendant's Attire Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

name: Toy Zombies
summary: Escape the abandoned mall by hiding from the creatures, learn their behaviors and explore the place to find the way out.

name: Shuffles 'n Scuffles
summary: Enter a papercraft world in this single-player, deck-building, card-battling, roguelike strategy game. Use your wits to battle your way through waves of enemies, while rewriting the very definitions of the cards you hold.

name: Homeshift
summary: Guide a young boy through fears and dark caverns, in hopes of reaching a happy home. Homeshift sees you platforming in diverse environments, utilising your wits and tools to overcome challenges in creative ways.

name: Happy Bones: Welcome Home
summary: After receiving a frantic message from her father, Laura heads out to her parents house located inside a cult compound to search for the truth, in this complete remake of the classic horror themed JRPG!

name: Pizza Slice
summary: More than just a simulator, Pizza Slice is a true Italian adventure! Take on the role of Tonio, manage your family pizzeria, bake authentic Italian pizzas, fight the competition and grow your business. See if you can win the title of the best pizzeria in the area!

name: Forever-Happy-Town
summary: A PvE multiplayer shooter where a prophecy of eight endless nights is rapidly approaching, are you good enough to keep the town forever happy? You'd better be, else a herd of lovely rabbits will require rapid relocation.

name: You're My Favorite Person
summary: Spend time with your new best friend! Have fun as it takes you through digital worlds to solve puzzles and collect Perfect Stars! After all, it knows what's best! It knows what's best! It knows what's best.

name: The Last Screening
summary: You find yourself inside a cinema hallway, ready to watch your film. The venue, however, has other plans for you.

name: Reap: We Reap What Crawls
summary: Co-op horror dungeon crawling X creature collection & farming! Descend into shifting dungeons, throw physics objects, and trap terrifying monsters! Imprison them in your decaying basement lair, farm and feed them cursed crops, then sell them to crazy buyers. R.E.P.O. meets Slime Rancher!

name: Killer Island
summary: A first-person social deduction survival horror game. Stranded with your friends on a foggy island—but one of you is a killer. Chop wood to stay warm, hunt animals for food, retrieve artifacts for sacrifice, and expose the killer before it’s too late. 3–8 players. Proximity voice chat.

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection
summary: Twin Rathalos, born in a twist of fate. Two centuries after a conflict that divided neighboring kingdoms, the drums of war are reignited as twin Rathalos—long thought extinct—hatch from a single egg: an omen of destruction. Is there hope beyond the northern border?

name: Lucid Blocks
summary: Explore, build, and survive in a liminal voxel expanse oozing with surreal landscapes and esoteric critters.

name: The Shame of a Daydreamer
summary: Shame & choices = possible apocalypse. You need to figure out what’s causing the apocalypse to happen, so that you can prevent it. 2 playable characters with different relations to shame → 2 unique perspectives of the same story. Complicated families, branching choices and unforgiving consequences.

name: Digital Market Simulator
summary: Run a marketplace where you can sell games and everything related, take care of customers and shape it however you want.

name: Reflections of the Void
summary: A sci-fi drama about love, control, and the price of human emotion. Care for your wards, follow every order — or break the rules to discover who you truly are.

name: Five Nights at Frickbear's 3
summary:
Five Nights at Frickbear's 3 is a FNaF fangame with a big focus on player choice and replayability, featuring a uniquely goofy art style, a metric buttload of unique animatronic enemies, 3D free-roam minigames, and multiple story routes!

Can YOU survive Five Nights at Frickbear's? ...3?

name: Dyping Escape
summary: Escape from a dying-typing game where the words you type become reality and turn against you.

name: Shifting To The Backrooms
summary: "Shifting To The Backrooms" is a mix of psychological horror and drama game where the protagonist, Will, grappling with family tragedies, discovers the method of "shifting" enabling him to escape to the dream liminal worlds. However, the dream turns into a nightmare from which Will cannot wake up.

name: Funi Raccoon Game
summary: Explore a series of whimsical, interconnected worlds to steal everything not nailed down. Make a garbage bin a garbage home :)

name: Piece by Piece
summary: Piece by Piece is a jigsaw puzzle platformer where each level is fragmented into jigsaw pieces. Clear each puzzle by connecting and disconnecting each piece to make your way through each of our 100 handcrafted levels. Discover new themes and mechanics along the way!

name: Vespera Bononia
summary: Fight the nightmares of the city! Master a blend of third-person shooting, magic, and bullet hell to survive the fast-paced, ever-changing chaos that grips the streets. Change classes during combat, enter Bononia, and face your destiny.

name: Shadows Of Wyrmwood
summary: Shadows of Wyrmwood is a roguelike adventure RPG. Use spells, swords, and strategy to defeat every corrupted foe. Travel across four procedurally generated maps that grow harder with every encounter. With each victory, you obtain new armor, weapons, and spells from defeated enemies.

name: Yellow Trouble
summary: 8-way water gun blasting horizontal 2D arcade co-op shoot ‘em up, with ducks?!

name: Spoopcore 3D
summary: Spoopcore 3D is a low-poly 3D platformer/FPS hybrid where you play as a slime named Reggie on a mission to save ducks from across the multiverse and kill a god. Zoom through levels, find secrets, and dispatch enemies using weapon combos.

name: Turbo Dismount 2
summary: Turbo Dismount 2 is a comedy physics racing sandbox with Mr. Dismount and his friends. It is the officially ambitious sequel to the wildly popular, immensely successful, world-renowned entertainment juggernaut - Turbo Dismount.

name: Gensokyo: Presumption of Guilt - Pansies Before Dawn
summary: An ancient village, once sealed by yokais for a millennium, is now plagued by a series of bizarre yokai murders. Follow the protagonist as they delve into the investigation, unravelling the mysteries submerged in the history.

name: Mythmatch
summary: A Greek mythology community sim about bringing people together by putting things together.

name: Bird Watching Simulator
summary: An avid bird watching simulator with realistic watching mechanics. Grab your binoculars and build your attention span, Bird Watching Simulator is an unbelievably relaxing and interactive game that draws you so close to nature, it feels like you're apart of it.

name: Space Tales
summary: Space Tales is a real-time strategy game set in a retro-futuristic environment. Take on the role of a commander in the Intergalactic Planetary Expansion (I.P.E.) and immerse yourself in a thrilling mission to explore and conquer new planets, pushing the boundaries of the Human Empire.

name: Rustil: Eternal Labyrinth Castle
summary: In a randomly changing labyrinth castle, Rustil aims for the top floor. An exhilarating roguelike action game in which players aim to reach the top floor while efficiently strengthening the main character by acquiring abilities from the souls of heroes.

name: Ghost Cam
summary: Ghost Cam is a spooky exploratory VR and PC game where you search for ghosts – at your own risk… Discover how good you are at finding ghosts, figuring out clues and uncovering the story - if you can survive the multiple endings.

name: Subsequence
summary: Subsequence is a linear single player story driven 3D adventure game about overcoming obstacles, solving logical puzzles and exploration of the world.

name: Panic Floor!!
summary: An extremely unforgiving and constrained precision oriented platformer with fast paced flow!!

name: Ash & Rust
summary: The next generation of ARPG is finally here! Fight your way through mysterious places, face mighty foes, and construct the perfect build. Enemies are strong and smart, but you'll have a massive arsenal of tools and abilities to master in order to vanquish them. Dive in!

name: LasTar
summary: Survive endless waves, stack powerful upgrades, and create broken builds in this fast-paced 2D spaceship roguelike. Unlock permanent progression, experiment with different weapons and amulets, and push your limits against escalating enemy threats

name: Mnemosyne's Cube
summary: My name is left behind these white walls. In its place, I am left with dozens of questions. I wander aimlessly, though she seems to guide me. I do not feel safe. Twenty-four hours... and everything will fall into place.

name: Räv Kafé
summary: Räv Kafé is a 2D action platformer where you wander around in the world and in order to survive you need to find materials and food. Explore the open world.

name: Unity-Chan: Desktop Companion
summary: An AI desktop companion with her own personality and a virtual room to play various mini games with her. "Hi! My name is Kohaku Otori, but everyone calls me Unity-chan! I just found a way to visit you on your desktop, may I come? 🧡"

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Accessory: Gold Circlet
summary: Contains the following: Accessory: Gold Circlet A special accessory for the protagonist to wear!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Simon: Wind Wyvern's Friend
summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Simon: Wind Wyvern's Friend Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

name: Sniper: Elite Shooter Squad & The World of War II: Frontlines of History
summary: Aim true. Fight smart. Rewrite history.

name: Street Soccer
summary: Jump into casual street soccer and relive the joy of playing on the neighborhood playground.

name: Speed Boom: Last Delivery
summary: FULL SPEED. BEAT THE CLOCK. DELIVER OR LOSE.

name: Taxi Hyperdrive
summary: Drive at full speed, pick up passengers and compete for the top spot in this fast-paced futuristic taxi arcade.

name: ACA Neo Geo: Pop'n Bounce
summary:
"Pop’n Bounce" is a brick breaker released by Video System in 1997.
Enemy characters serving as blocks fuse into a single unit when adjacent enemies are the same color.
Connect as many as possible to make them grow, then take them down to score massive points and earn power-up items!

name: Killing Floor III: Operation Deep Freeze
Quick Brain Letter Hunt
summary: Find the ONE specified character! Search across Hiragana, English letters, Hangul, and Traditional Chinese!

name: Quick Deduction Short Mysteries
summary: One-minute spark, satisfying payoff! A collection of bite-sized mysteries you can solve in no time.

name: Silent Harmony
summary:
Silent Harmony is an emotional rhythm game where you tribute your late sister's death and try not to let people down, falling into her place in the band upon her death.

Silent Harmony is an emotional rhythm game where you play a virtual clarinet and control your breathing. You pick up your late sister's clarinet and continue her legacy in her old band as Noah Harper, a young depressed teenage boy. While pressure builds up, you struggle not to make Noah feel like he has let his sister down.

name: Zumba: Galactic Marble Blast
summary: Leap across the cosmos—match, blast, and save the galaxy in marble style!

name: Veggie Warfare: Feast of Fury
summary: Enter the warzone against furious killer vegetables!

name: Eggconsole Advanced Lord Monarch PC-9801
summary: Fortify your nation and conquer enemy castles in Falcom's masterpiece RTS. With 52 diverse stages and addictive gameplay centered on occupation rates.

name: Ready or Not: Boiling Point
summary: The relentlessly debased city of Los Sueños faces an existential crisis when a subversive terror attack severs any remaining faith in what's become an ineffective and overwhelmingly militarized city government.

name: Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax
summary: Strong hands. Playful tension. Total relaxation.

name: CreArt: Painting by Numbers
summary: Relaxation meets creativity

name: FixForce
summary: Leap, climb, and launch your friends in this chaotic co-op extraction platformer for up to 6 players! Use your drill-wrench to build your way across a vibrant post-apocalyptic world, find replacement parts, and fix broken machines. And if you lose your head, don’t worry: it’s all part of the job.

name: Six Seven Nights
summary: You have six nights. The seventh day changes everything.

name: DecaDungeons
summary: DecaDungeons is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler where fate is decided by a magical six-sided dice. Explore 10 deadly dungeons, battle fierce foes, hunt monsters, and survive!

name: Collie Call: The Future Is Calling
summary: Collie Call: Sheep Mission in Space

name: Province Simulator
summary: Province Simulator is a survival-driven quest game set in a harsh Russian provincial city. Fight cold, hunger, and illness, earn little money, endure unpredictable weather, and try to escape to a better life.

name: Metrocity
summary: Play Metrocity, a challenging and innovative city builder game. prove your ability to organize and create the best city in the world. develop your city from 0 to thousands of people only in this game.

name: CFS: Chinese Football Simulator
summary: Chinese Football Simulator is a management game themed around Chinese football. As both club owner and head coach, you'll develop and manage teams either existing or customimmersed in authentic Chinese football culture.

name: Echoes of Myth
summary: Action Roguelite with a bit weightier Souls-lite combat in a broken world where you're chasing that perfect run. Loot and draw power from relics of vanished gods, forge devastating builds from spell and steel, and crush the wretches in your way!

name: Island of Ruin
summary: "Island of Ruin" is a puzzle novel game where you collect memory cores hidden across the island and uncover the truth behind a tragedy of the past. When the horrors that befell the boys and girls and the island’s strange phenomena are revealed, what final choice will you make?

name: Ollie and the Merchant of Dreams
summary: Ollie and the Merchant of Dreams is a 2D Metroidvania where you traverse a lore-rich world, summon monsters to your aid, ride a winged unicorn into battle, and unravel a story of duty and betrayal to free all of creation from chaos.

name: Plane vs. Blocks
summary: "Plane vs. Squares" is a vampire survivor-like game in which you shoot squares, gain experience and upgrade your weapons. It includes 7 playable levels and 10+ upgradeable, selectable weapons. Choose your Plane, defeat the Squares, and achieve victory!

name: Pocket Flight
summary: Fly your own way in Pocket Flight - a cozy endless flight adventure! Explore dynamic biomes, face shifting weather, customize your plane, and take on daily challenges. Relaxing skies, infinite horizons. Ready for takeoff?

name: Chosen Garden
summary: In this unique roguelike deck-builder, tend your garden and harvest plants for high scores! 100+ plants, 5 gardens, and a wealth of unique weather, animals, and tools — countless builds await!

name: Dung Ho!
summary: Dung Ho! is a co-op physics game where you and your friends are dung beetles rolling a (dung) ball into a hole.

name: Coraroc
summary: A back-to-basics retro platformer! Waking up alone in a mysterious laboratory, Coraroc must make his way through colorful stages and dastardly enemies to rescue his friends. Can you help Coraroc defeat the Pacicap menace?

name: Mewseum: Film Festival
summary: Mewseum: Film Festival is a puzzle game featuring famous movie posters in a charming feline universe. Get the museum ready for the big gala night in a relaxing and fun experience! Lights, camera... meow!

name: Labyrinthesis
summary: Navigate your way through floors of enemies and descend deeper into an underground laboratory. Hack your gun to unlock new weapons, and defeat the machine guarding the elevator.

name: MeowSon
summary: MeowSon is a fun arcade adventure with simple controls and nice graphics. Jump in four directions, collect coins and find all three crystals in each intricate level. Interesting puzzles, obstacles and enemies await you, which will allow you to always keep your reaction in good shape.

name: Beltlife: Prospector
summary: Beltlife: Prospector is a GUI-based "hard" sci-fi business/work sim with economy simulation and RPG elements. Your focus is on maintaining your ship's systems and your health while prospecting for asteroid claims to auction on simulated markets.

name: Trailmarks
summary: Inspired by Carmen Sandiego, Trailmarks is a globe-spanning strategy adventure where you circumnavigate the planet as a travel guide fact-checker. Plan routes across 1,200 cities, answer 120,000+ trivia questions, trade souvenirs, and prove your expertise to unlock new countries.

name: Writer's Block
summary: Writer's Block is a falling block word game mashup where you write one block at a time. Put your vocabulary to the test, set up combos, and try not to let the letters pile up!

name: Shalnor: Silverwind Saga 2
summary: An RPG/Action Adventure game. With focus on gauntlet-style combat, traps, boss fights, and beautiful pixel-art scenery. Rynna has arrived on an island plagued by monsters and undead fiends raised by an evil Necromancer. The souls of those who remain cannot be free, until the Necromancer is slain!

name: Nyanjet
summary: "nyanjet" is a precision platformer where the only way is up. Be cautious, be bold, and never fear the fall. Master the simple yet challenging controls of a cat-piloted jetpack.

name: Withered Haven
summary: Withered Haven is a first-person psychological horror game. After the tragic loss of his wife and daughter, a broken man struggles to endure a collapsing reality. Familiar apparitions drift closer, echoing memories that mask a darkness beyond comprehension.

name: Hollowreach: Alone
summary: A third-person psychological horror focused on exploration and puzzle-solving. Trapped between the dead and his own thoughts, fight to maintain your sanity in a forgotten world. Each day echoes voices from the past — and the line between reality and delusion begins to fade.

name: Chees
summary: What if your chess pieces lied to you? In CHEES, rooks crawl like pawns, queens leap like knights, and every game shuffles the rules. Outsmart the chaos in local PvP or challenge the AI. Think you can adapt?

name: Monster Mine Clash
summary: Survive waves of monsters from every direction! Aim with your mouse, defeat enemies, upgrade your weapons, and mine ores to grow stronger. Faster reflexes and smarter upgrades mean longer survival!

name: Cuberio
summary: A casual strategy-puzzle game where you guide a cube through 100 handcrafted mazes, avoid moving hazards, collect coins, and unlock upgrades.

name: Living Dead Outbreak
summary: Battle your way through the dense zombie crowds as you struggle to survive! Inspired by classic zombie movies and FPS games from the 90s, the overwhelming combat will keep you on your toes!

name: Let Deco Desktop
summary: A cute idle-crafting game nestled in the corner of your screen. Visit various regions to gather diverse materials and decorate your home with furniture you've crafted yourself!

name: Clockwillows Voy Quest
summary: Take control of Voy and jump all over the place, this is an adventure game with arcade elements, defeat enemies that hinder you on the way with jumps and punches in this magical-tech adventure!

name: Forest Loop
summary: Forest Loop is a cozy incremental adventure game where you collect flowers, avoid hunters, and upgrade your way through the forest.

name: Munchy Cat
summary: Cat + Food + Color Matching! A feel-good, yummy puzzle that lifts your mood

name: Console Archives: Sonic Wings Special
summary:
"Sonic Wings Special" was released by Video System in 1996 for a 32-bit home console.
In this shooting game, a diverse group of fighter pilots from around the world battle to stop a coup staged by an evil organization.
The game features a multi-ending system where the story route changes based on the player's choices. Choose your ultimate partner and fight to restore world peace!

name: Zelene Lux: Spirit Notes
summary: Free the trapped souls of your friends from a haunted manor. Solve cryptic riddles, find hidden objects, and restore a sanctuary to banish the cult of Magister Vane!

name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Daedunsan
summary: This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed.

name: Charmcraft Idle
summary: Charmcraft Idle is a cozy, witchy idle shop simulator where you gather magical resources, craft enchanted goods, and slowly automate every part of your spellbound business. Click, craft, study, and hire staff as your humble witch shop grows into a magical enterprise.

name: RAM Downloader
summary: Do you need more RAM? Of course you do. Everybody does. Get RAM Downloader and improve your quality of life. It's easy. You click Download. RAM increases. You live a happier life.

name: No Nap November
summary: No Nap November is a short psychological horror game set in a kindergarten during an endless nap time. Observe each loop carefully, spot anomalies, and survive an entire month without sleep to save yourself and the children from a strange presence.

name: Blue Flow
summary: Follow our blue hero through a challenging 2D platformer filled with precision jumps, fast-paced shooting, and clever puzzles. Each pixel-art level rewards skill, timing, and persistence. Overcome tricky obstacles and uncover new mechanics as the journey unfolds.

name: Eggrolls Shoot
summary: Eggrolls Shoot is a retro inspired arcade shoot ‘em up game. Our game is all about the adventure of saving the animal world.

name: A Game About Making Mosaics
summary: A calm sandbox game about crafting and placing tiles to create mosaics. No goals, no pressure, just you, colors, and creativity.

name: Absolute Tennis Manager 2
summary: Immerse yourself in the world of tennis with ATM 2! Create or take on the role of a player and manage every aspect of their career: schedule, training, staff, personal life... Build your legend, tournament after tournament, and aim for the ultimate place in the Hall of Fame.

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Hellfire Tail
summary: Contains the following: Monster Hair: Hellfire Tail A special hairstyle for the protagonist!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Goss Hairagy
summary: Contains the following: Monster Hair: Goss Hairagy A special hairstyle for the protagonist!

name: Backrooms Interception
summary: Immerse yourself in a rich Backrooms experience filled with crafting, combat, exploration, and interactions with otherworldly entities. As you progress, a gripping narrative unfolds, revealing secrets hidden within the endless corridors. But be warned danger lurks around every corner.

name: Wandfall
summary: Master tactical combat and collect powerful Sigils in this challenging roguelike. Navigate procedural maps through three acts of escalating difficulty, where every encounter shapes your build and every decision determines your survival.

name: End of Line
summary: Stay alive in this first-person horror-puzzle game. Trapped inside a claustrophobic train, each carriage tests you differently.

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Monster Hair: Malzeno Bob
summary: Contains the following: Monster Hair: Malzeno Bob A special hairstyle for the protagonist!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Monster Hair: Garangolm Nest
summary: Contains the following: Monster Hair: Garangolm Nest A special hairstyle for the protagonist!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Monster Hair: Espinas Spikes
summary: Contains the following: Monster Hair: Espinas Spikes A special hairstyle for the protagonist!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Monster Hair: Octolocks Princess
summary: Contains the following: Monster Hair: Octolocks Princess A special hairstyle for the protagonist!

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Eleanor: Foreign Dancer
summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Eleanor: Foreign Dancer Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

name: Genesis Relic: Idle Sandbox Simulator
summary: A sandbox idle management sim: pick the preset worlds “Three-Kingdoms Conquest” “The Golden Lotus” or “Famine Legend” then build and govern your own realm. The in-game editor lets you customize development rules, characters and plots, export your world, or load and share creations with others.

name: Overcat
summary: OVERCAT is a 1v1 twin-stick fighting game, where competitive and casual players can finally have a fair fight!

name: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake
summary: The full remake of FATAL FRAME / PROJECT ZERO II: Crimson Butterfly. This Japanese-style horror adventure game follows twin sisters lost in an abandoned village haunted by evil spirits. Using the Camera Obscura, they fight ghosts as the story unfolds.

name: Put One In for Johnny Minn
summary:
Stylized physics-soccer arcade puzzle game. Players score using diving headers, volleys, side volleys, and free kicks. Beat levels by discovering the optimal way to solve the level. Timing and precision are needed to make good contact with the ball in order to achieve high contact quality and goal placement scores.

Includes local PvP multiplayer modes: 1v1 (striker vs. keeper) and pass-and-play shot-for-shot party mode for 2-8 local players.

name: Berghotel Heist
summary: Co-op horror game that takes place in the Austrian Alps. Your break into a hotel, searching for valuable treasures, but little did you know that Perchten and Krampus are already waiting for you.

name: Bianka Lovesick
summary: In classic survival horror fashion, in Bianka Lovesick you explore many places looking for items in order to advance. Collect Ammo and heal items to increase your chances of surviving this nightmare. Each decision counts, so think twice on which enemy to kill and with what weapon.

name: 1348: Ex Voto
summary: Journey through a tumultuous Medieval Italy as Aeta, a young knight errant who sets off on a brutal quest to find and save her closest one. 1348 Ex Voto is a cinematic action-adventure game inspired by chivalric tales.

name: Fetch Quest Remastered
summary: Would-be adventurer Flora accepts a job to retrieve a stolen item for a shady bartender. To retrieve the item, she'll have to infiltrate a group of notorious bandits by posing as a new recruit. This expands the hit game Fetch Quest with more content, upgraded graphics and unlockable extras through different story routes.

name: Fetch Re;Quest
summary: After successfully leading her friends through a one-shot TTRPG campaign, part-time barista and full-time gamer Flora now faces a new challenge… How can she possibly muster up the courage to tell her DM that she likes him?!

name: Go Ahead
summary: A third-person action game that challenges your reflexes and reasoning with deadly traps, puzzles, and precision. Overcome extreme laboratory trials and discover what awaits you beyond the next step.

name: Rhell: Warped Worlds & Troubled Times
summary: Create unique spells by combining magical runes to solve puzzles your way. Transform objects, manipulate time, and discover the mysteries of a world where everyone has vanished, leaving only 12 people behind. Every puzzle has multiple solutions - if you can imagine it, you can probably do it.

name: Cozy Factory
summary: Cozy Factory is a relaxing automation game that lets you design your own production line to make cakes in the shape, flavor, and color your customers want. Place the machines correctly, complete the orders, and enjoy a sweet production flow!

name: SkyRunner
summary: A fast-paced first-person platformer with combat and style. Wall-run, jump, slide, and grapple through the skies with mind-melting speed and a set of powerful abilities.Master your movement and destroy anything in your path.

name: Corner Shop: NightShift
summary: Take a night shift job in a place that runs on habit, not purpose. Restock shelves, take deliveries, clean the mess, and try to make it till morning. Not everything feels right and you’re never quite alone. Something waits in the dark.

name: Space Supermarket Simulator
summary: Run your own supermarket in outer space. Keep shelves stocked and nicely organized. Supply your store with drone delivery.

name: Salvage Shop Simulator
summary: Enter the world of shopkeepers trading in reclaimed goods! Bid for the best items at auction, prepare and clean the bought items, and then sell them in your shop. Test your skills and watch your business grow!

name: Grove
summary: Nurture a small forest under siege by lumberjacks in this cozy tower defense game. Plant and upgrade trees with unique abilities to protect your grove, customize and decorate your forest, and unwind with the soothing escape of building a natural haven from a single sapling.

name: Seen Before
summary: Seen Before is a psychological horror game where you are trapped in a looping environment, trying to detect inconsistencies and escape the cycle.

name: The Tower of Shadows
summary: Tower of Shadows is a turn-based strategy game where every decision counts. Climb the levels one by one, face formidable opponents, and perfect your tactics to reach the top. Your ultimate challenge? The Master of Shadows himself.

name: Ultra Maze
summary: This is the ultimate Maze Game. The mazes are procedurally generated, and so are always unique. There are plenty of options to create an experience to your likings.

name: Anarchy Road
summary: Fast Speeds, Big Explosions, even Bigger Bosses and action throughout! Anarchy Road is a Post-Apocalyptic action driving game where our 4 heroes must race against the clock, battle bosses, while blasting enemies and dodging traps in order to survive to the explosive end!

name: Tezzel: The Tilemaker's Tale
summary: Tezzel is a cozy, colorful, and crafty puzzle game where every move helps make a masterpiece. Discover mind-bending mechanics across 100+ handcrafted levels.

name: Filthium Zero
summary: Filthium Zero is a single-player survivor-like action roguelite. Purge the Filthium-infested zones of Earth, take on hordes of mutants reanimated by the corruption, engage in vertical and ground combat, and watch the ragdolls fly.

name: Solasta II
summary: In a Mana-infused land, a dark force led by the enigmatic Shadwyn threatens Neokos. Bring your party of adventurers together across perilous realms in this Turn-Based Tactical RPG based on the SRD 5e ruleset. You make the choices, dice decide your destiny.

name: Magical Massage
summary: In a world where magic reigns, you're a rare mundane masseur, easing stressed magicians to prevent disaster. Flaming nostrils, flowers sprouting from backs, floods on the bed—nothing too fancy that you can't handle. However, if your skills fall short, these powerful, unclothed threats may kill you.

name: Rolling Ball Game DX: Director's Cut
summary: Rolling Ball Game returns with Rolling Ball Game DX: Director's Cut! Traverse through obstacles and avoid the capsule-bots trying to knock you off the stage. Featuring all new and remastered levels, alongside extra content.

name: Aetheria: Whispers of the Forest Moon
summary: In the enchanting world of Aetheria, three fairy warriors are on the cusp of graduating from their academy when their city is suddenly attacked. Embark on epic quests and missions to uncover the source of the darkness threatening their land.

name: Net.Attack(): Code or Die!
summary: CODE OR DIE! Hack enemy systems & survive the security response by engineering lethal bullet-heaven algorithms. Your brain power determines your firepower across 150+ programming nodes. Debug your failures. Optimize your code. Complete the heist. HACK THE PLANET!

name: Solateria
summary: In a world where the Litt have perished, a small pyron warrior embarks on a journey to find the King, the Primordial Flame, the last hope to save the world. Defeat mighty foes, unleash fiery attacks, and master parrying. Explore a beautifully hand-drawn world and uncover its secrets.

name: Express Car Wash Simulator
summary: Use colorful soaps and enjoy the satisfaction of a perfect clean. Collect rare vehicle cards to unlock iconic rides, add new services to your shop, and expand your craft. But stay sharp - taking down non-paying customers with a tennis ball gun is all part of the job!

name: Bloodgrounds
summary: Delve into roguelike arena combat and city management where core gameplay features strategic battles, town development, and character growth. Command Gladiator units and navigate various mechanics for a comprehensive gaming experience.

name: Collector's Cove
summary: Set sail on a cozy farming adventure aboard your boat in Collector's Cove. Explore diverse climate zones with your animal companion and discover a multitude of rare crops and fish. Enjoy cozy solitude while completing your Collector's compendium and rise to the rank of a Named Collector.

name: Autotag
summary: Embark on a heart-pounding adventure in Autotag, where classic tag meets a twist of mayhem! Armed with powerful weapons, outsmart opponents in the destructible arena, and prove your skills in intense online multiplayer battles. Are you ready for the ultimate game of tag?

name: Sealed Bite: Extended
summary: Emilia's life turns into chaos as her family members disappear, one by one. Forced to put her trust in a wolf spirit, Emilia sets off to search the land while pressured into feeding a monstrous power. Will the enigmatic figure she encounters offer guidance, or is Emilia diving head-first into peril?

name: Stellar Wanderer DX
summary: Stellar Wanderer DX is an old-school space combat sim set in a vast open-world universe. Follow the story or choose your favorite side missions as a mercenary fighter pilot. Explore the galaxy, upgrade your ship and weapons, trade resources and fight outlaws.

name: Mark's Power
summary: Mark's Power is an adventure game that combines elements of many genres. You will have to interact with the locals of an unknown planet in order to repair your ship and fly home.

name: Shrapnel
summary: Shrapnel is a 4v4 objective FPS. Operators clash in a storm-ravaged impact zone to control Sigma—a volatile resource capable of reshaping humanity’s future.

name: Egypt Frontiers
summary: In the game Egypt Frontiers, players explore ancient Egypt, constructing authentic pyramid and making strategic decisions. The game offers the opportunity to learn about real history or create their own vision of civilization in both strategy and first-person modes.

name: Neon Runner
summary: Test yourself on the neon lit tracks of Neon Runner. A fast paced runner style game that requires speed and precision to complete all levels as quickly as possible and set a high score.

name: DPS Idle 2
summary: The long-awaited sequel to DPS Idle. Collect cards, upgrade cards, defeat monsters, join guilds and hire heroes. DPS IDLE 2!

name: John Carpenter's Toxic Commando
summary: Take control of one of the commandos, team up with your friends and send the Sludge God and its horde of things-that-should-never-be back to the underworld. Choose the class that matches your playstyle, pile into your favorite ride, and unload an array of gunfire, grenades, special abilities, and freaking katanas as you save the planet.

name: Light Fairytale: Episode 3
summary: A turn-based JRPG series featuring a modern presentation with a classic core. Episode 3 carries over with Haru as he gathers a party of new and old friends on a journey to the lost 'Sky'.

name: Demon Seed
summary: First-person survival game set in the early stages of an apocalypse. Explore urban areas filled with brainless demons. Find what you really want or become one of THEM.

name: Bootstrap Island
summary: Stranded in the 17th century after a brutal shipwreck, you awaken alone on a deadly tropical island. To survive, you’ll need to learn fast - facing wild beasts, nature’s wrath, and uncovering secrets hidden deep in the jungle. Every step is a fight for your life.

name: Pirates of Gravitae
summary:
Pirates of Gravitae is an action roguelike game with fast-paced aerial dogfights, set in a fictional version of the Golden Age of Piracy.

The player commands a rocket propelled pirate ship that they can equip with various weapons and abilities, as they fight against a variety of enemies. They can choose from a selection of different bonuses at the end of every battle, to customize their ship as they go. These bonuses expire at the end of a run. They can also unlock new abilities or upgrade crew members, for perks that persist between runs.

name: Wraith Ops
summary: Wraith Ops is a fast-paced FPS shooter focusing on satisfying gunplay and back-to-basics playstyle. Its main goal is to bring together objective-based gameplay with a focus on teamwork, fast movement, snappy combat and more realistic/tactical features loved by many. Learning from its peers, we believe that realistic features and gameplay elements can work not only by putting obstacles in your way but by helping you overcome them, enhance the experience and improve your immersion.

name: RoadOut
summary:
The world is dominated by an A.I. and rebel groups take refuge in a desert area known as the DeadZone.

Claire survives by executing delivery, sabotage and murder contracts for local leaders, while discovering about her past, revealing strange evidence that links her existence with the origin of the A.I.

name: Timberborn
summary: Humans are long gone. In a world struck by droughts and toxic waste, will your lumberpunk beavers do any better? Timberborn is a city-building game featuring ingenious animals, vertical architecture, water physics, and terraforming. Contains high amounts of wood.

name: EFootball 2026 by Felix Pro
summary: EFootball 2026 by Felix pro is a mobile game for Java and J2ME Loader. is realised in 2026 by Asaba Jumah.

name: Upcreek
summary: A short, cozy experience where you enjoy cleaning a lively nature park.

name: Cats vs Trolls
summary: Cats VS Trolls is a humorous and relaxing hidden object game with hand-drawn graphics.

name: Rocket League: Season 22
summary: Season 22 helps you perform at your highest level with new training options and UI elements to help you play more strategically. Your matchmaking rating, visible recharge progress for boost pads, and flip reset status are coming.

name: Breve Bug: Champions of Destiny
summary: Breve Bug: Champions of Destiny is a unique RPG in which you play as a roly poly who lives in a tin can. You have a job as a barista, and your goal is to expand your business across the cosmos. Buy upgrades like lavender syrup and high quality espresso, use dialogue choices to get higher tips.

name: And Yet, We Dream
summary: a psychological visual novel where you investigate the souls of the dead. spend time with them, analyze their past, file reports to decide their eternal fate.

name: Lint
summary: Lint is a minimalist idle game where lint builds up the longer you stay. Collect it, upgrade your production, and turn tiny dust balls into an unstoppable fluff empire.

name: 8:00 AM: Still Morning
summary: 8:00 AM – Still Morning is a short narrative exploration game about an ordinary morning and the emotions hidden beneath routine — an atmospheric experience where a familiar day slowly begins to feel different, repeating again and again even when not everyone is ready to wake up.

name: The Garden of Youth
summary: "The Garden of Youth" is a visual light novel with a focus on youthful love. The story mainly tells of a group of teenagers and girls suffering from mental illness -" AS "- who are involved in a" box court "experiment.

name: Valla
summary: vallaWorld... Here, it’s not just about games; this is the true home of vibes, laughter, and playing to win ! Get ready for legendary challenges and an endless gathering with your followers. Jump in and show us your vallah

name: One in One Million
summary: Trapped in a small room, four friends must uncover the mystery hidden within its walls while confronting the secrets of an elusive truth. Answers are just a button away. A psychological thriller visual novel packed with dark humor and fascinating facts about raccoons.

name: Diablo IV: Season of Slaughter
summary: A demonologist enlists your aid to master his dark craft in preparation for Mephisto’s inevitable assault on Sanctuary. Through your shared experiments, you gain the ability to transform into The Butcher, a power only partially under your control.

name: Yellowcreek Stories: The Cabin Watcher
summary: A masked killer hunts you in the dark. Manage noise and light, hide quickly, and survive this intense 60–90 minute first-person stealth horror experience inspired by classic 80s slasher films.

name: 1 CatLine
summary: Master puzzling stages with the help of your 2D feline companion!

name: Hiragana Flashcards
summary: A small introduction to Japanese. Hiragana is the most common alphabet, used for native words. Our flashcards show each character, its sound, and example words. Progress through fun Challenge Lessons, meet new kana, and reinforce what you’ve learned, step by step!

name: Mekanion
summary: Defeat Mekanions, the mechanical lifeforms consuming the entire world!

name: Another Game About Automation
summary: Another Game About Automation is a casual factory-building where you have to generate numbers and combine them with mathematical operations. Upgrade and unlock new mathematical operations.

name: Dig for Riches
summary: Dig For Riches is a realistic mining simulation. Dig the earth, extract valuable minerals, haul them to the surface by cart and sell them. Use your earnings to upgrade your equipment, dig deeper, and face increasing dangers.

name: Pig Commander
summary: Pig Commander is a fast paced roguelike RTS where chaos rules every battle. Build improvised armies, pick a commander, and survive unpredictable challenges round after round.

name: Gal Vs Village
summary: GAL VS VILLAGE is an GAL like old-school FPS. You play as Kessenji “Blood-sucker” Yui, infiltrate the village, and must bring the situation under control. Move at high speed, swing your knife, blast away with the shotgun, and drive away the supernatural!!!!!!

name: Dungeons & Warbands
summary: A fast turn-based, grid-based hack and slash Dungeon Crawler in an Open World with many towns, caves, and dungeons to visit or raid. Go solo or lead your warband of allies or monsters. Engage in brutal combat with realistic armor layers protecting against crippling body part damage.

name: All in One
summary: ALL IN ONE is a co-op physics game where five players share one body or sometimes, a single object. Control balance, jump, and climb together through our custom physics system. Even simple moves can be a huge challenge so communicate, encourage, and move as one.

name: Mushroom Nook
summary: Mushrooms of all kinds—adorable, quirky, and even some with unique abilities—are spring up randomly on your computer! Collect and nurture them, then decorate with various objects to create your own cozy mushroom haven, keeping you company while you work, study, or simply unwind.

name: Deployed
summary: Survive waves of asteroids in the reversed bullet hell with meta progression. Defend your customizable spaceship from incoming asteroids by upgrading its systems. Use research lab for offline upgrades. Send offline expeditions to uncover the unknowns of the universe.

name: Chopped Up
summary: A cozy horror cooking game with a deadly twist. Serve bizarre fantasy creatures and secretly eliminate targets as an assassin hiding in plain sight. Just keep an eye out for those out to get you.

name: Out of Sight: Stage Fright
summary: Uncover the story of a tormented Unseen, a spirit child who reaches out to Sophie for help with their final performance. Together with Teddy, they reveal new perspectives, a chilling history, and a need to overcome their greatest fears.

name: Cirno! Lifts a Boulder
summary: Help Cirno get back into her home! A chill, bite-sized 3D platformer in which you explore a frozen Misty Lake and gain boulder-lifting strength.

name: Fun Zone Omega
summary: Explore, survive, and vibe in this post-apocalyptic RPG set in a vacation resort gone wrong. Choose your squad from 12 eccentric misfits, and scavenge the ruins of a hypercapitalist dystopia.

name: Tiny Jar Farm
summary: A cozy idle farming game where you grow tiny crops, merge them into stronger plants, and turn your harvest into delicious recipes. Relax, and build your perfect little farm - one jar at a time.

name: Disc Golf
summary: Disc Golf is a casual local multiplayer game for 1 to 4 players that brings the fun of the popular outdoor sport to your screen. Choose from a variety of characters and scenic courses and compete with friends for the lowest score!

name: DungeonSweeper
summary: A minesweeper rogue-like. Can you survive the dungeon?

name: Doctor Gallagher's Residence
summary: A retro-style point-and-click adventure. Step into the peculiar Gallagher Mansion to uncover its darkest secrets.

name: Swarm Me
summary: A minimalist horde survival arena where you can’t shoot back. You’re hunted by an endless swarm of drones - kite the horde, bait them into deadly traps, upgrade your defenses, and survive as long as you can. Every minute the swarm grows denser, faster, and deadlier.

name: Rewind 99
summary: The year is 1999. You're the last remaining video rental store. From humble VHS clerk to rental racketeer - run your video store and explore Reshoot Springs, building an underground empire. Expand with upgrades, side hustles, store membership, and more. Whatever it takes to survive.

name: Your Love Ai
summary: Your Love Ai is a game where you develop a relationship with an android robot named Ai, and your dialogue choices influence the ending. Will you be able to touch Ai's heart?

name: BitHero Survivors
summary: BitHero Survivors is a survivors-like pixel-art action RPG. Pick your hero, wield evolving weapons, harness powerful relics. Explore colorful stages, survive relentless enemy waves — and become a true hero!

name: Waving Around
summary: Jump, stomp and create dangerous waves to defeat up to 4 of your friends in this cute competitive arena. May the best stomper win!

name: Forest Construction VR
summary: In Forest Construction VR you will have the opportunity to experience all the joy of free construction with realistic physics, while being in a pleasant forest environment. A sandbox where the only limit is your imagination. Create a simple shelter or a piece of art? It's up to you!

name: MultiEnding Heroes
summary: Embark on a hilarious, choice-driven adventure in MultiEnding Heroes! Guide The Priest and The Hero through multiple universes, making decisions that lead to over 50 unique endings. Every choice matters, will you lead them to glory or disaster?

name: Blade Blitz
summary: Blade Blitz is a casual, yet competitive, local multiplayer game to play with your friends. Simply spin, slice, and poke your way through the opponents in a tug-of-war push to score the points for your team. Power ups provide tense matches, evening the odds as each team closes in on victory.

name: Chemistower
summary: Learn about Chemistry in this science based Tower Defense game! Purchase atoms to create compounds with properties like explosions, acid, and freezing in an effort to destroy antimatter enemies.

name: Piece by Piece
summary: It's time to open shop! Inherit your family's repair shop, and roll up your sleeves. Fix up the prized possessions of the forest folk, paint yourself a masterpiece to sell and make your family shop all your own with decorations, furniture and cookies!

name: Chop Shop
summary: Feel the flow as you hunt, butcher, and cook at a blisteringly fast pace in this action shop-keeping game. Hunt adorable monsters, chop colossal carcasses, and power-slice through huge chunks of flesh to serve your customers even faster. Move fast and stay sharp if you want your shop to survive.

name: Mama's Sleeping Angels
summary: Kiss and decapitate your friends in a Co-Op horror game about collecting cursed objects to feed to a deity called Mama, lest she hunger for you. Work together, and betray each other... Anything to keep Mama happy.

name: Pawnbroker Simulator
summary: Welcome to Pawnbroker Simulator, where you're the boss. Build your shop, strike deals, and test your business savvy in this indie simulation game. Dive into a world of trade and management. Can you make it big in the world of pawnbroking? Time to find out!

name: Yuma Nest
summary: Destroy massive swarms of monsters and build automated systems that fight for you in Yuma Nest. An open-world sandbox action RPG where you grow stronger in the overworld before exploring an interconnected underworld.

name: Rope-Kun Adventure
summary: A very unique rope action game in which the main character "Rope-kun", who wields a rope, overcomes various gimmicks! The possibilities for ropes are endless, from carrying objects, to bouncing balls, to tying up and defeating enemies! Overcome with him the many difficulties that await you!

name: Sancticide
summary: Become Ezechiel, the sin collector in service of Them at The Top, as he makes his way through the remains of our world during the End Times. It is the Apocalypse taken to the very letter, and his job is to eradicate sin and filth for the glory of God. Find out if a human being can endure such fate.

name: The State of Nowhere
summary: Assigned to station 65, your role as employee 100411 will be to serve and sell products to the people, exercising the controls the state deems necessary to keep the population in line

name: Treasure Hunters
summary: Treasure Hunters is an intense CO-OP treasure-hunting game set in mysterious dungeons filled with puzzles, platforms, and deadly creatures where your goal is to find and steal the most valuable treasures.

name: TransmuTowers
summary: The Kingdom is under attack! Collect resources, build towers, buy upgrades and work alone (or with up to 3 friends) to defend it! Select your favorite Alchemist from a magical coven, and fend off innumerable hordes of beasts in this post-apocalyptic fantasy world.

name: Memory Rewind
summary: Explore the thrilling detective visual novel adventure with your assistant Olivina. Find your way through the bizarre case that pulling you into unique investigation gameplay and meet the colorful cast of memorable characters that can help you or endanger you

name: Neo Dance
summary: Discover Neo Dance, the exciting 4-point music game! Immerse yourself in a dystopian cyberpunk world and face, to the rhythm of music, hundreds of robots in this unique experience. Are you ready for the rhythmic battle?

name: Eonia Revelations
summary: Take on the role of Blin Albius, the last Knowledge Seeker apprentice, and sort through the most exotic plants, minerals, and animals, in a vast and colorful fantastical world. Unravel the truth behind the great powers of the world and the secrets that rule everything.

name: Endless Dream
summary: This game is a suspense micro fear love to AVG game, a total of three men can fall in love; Different male characters will bring you unique love experience.

name: Bubblegum Galaxy
summary: Bubblegum Galaxy is a cute building strategy game about rebuilding the galaxy tile by tile. Discover and design new planets, complete missions, explore your office and befriend your co-workers... all while trying to find out who deleted the galaxy!

name: Reverse Module
summary: An Action RPG about Utopia/Dystopia balance that aims to present some interesting concepts. The aim of the game is to make the player think and pose some ethical dillemas about how an actual Utopia could be achieved. It's dedicated to my lost niece and my family who have supported me so much.

name: Furnace God
summary:
The world has been destroyed.

Anyways, follow Moku's journey to prove that the Sun is the ultimate furnace!

name: Exit: Echoes of Insanity
summary: Exit: Echoes of Insanity es un juego indie de survival horror en el que estás atrapado en un misterioso edificio lleno de secretos. Explora oscuras estancias, resuelve puzles y esquiva una presencia desconocida que siempre te acecha. Con una atmósfera opresiva y una narrativa intrigante, el juego combina exploración, tensión y supervivencia en una experiencia intensa.

name: Words from Pluto...
summary: An experimental platformer where words are tied to movement. Guide Pluto up the strange mountain and figure out what secrets are held within.

name: Double Mystery: Escape Room Bundle
summary:
This bundle includes the following escape rooms:
- The Lab - Escape Room
- The Island - Escape Room

name: Escape From Duck
summary: Master the battlefield or fall in the chaos.

name: Ghost of Yotei: Legends
summary:
Team up with friends online to challenge monstrous, supernatural versions of the Yōtei Six.

A Multiplayer mode that includes features like survival, story and incursion.

name: BallotGuessr
summary: A street view guessing game where players aim to determine how a particular county voted in a recent election based only on their surroundings.

name: Cities: Skylines - Race Day
summary: Get ready to rev up your city! Host high-octane races, thrilling running & cycling events, and large parades. Transform your streets into jaw-dropping spectacles that kick your city into overdrive!

name: Retina Rush
summary: Retina Rush is a fast-paced arcade dodger where you play as a demon’s runaway eyeball, blazing across the sky in a desperate escape from hell and humanity alike. Glide through pixel-art mountain vistas while weaving between relentless missiles and cursed projectiles that fill the screen. Simple controls and tight, responsive movement make it easy to pick up, but ruthless enemy patterns and score targets test your focus, reflexes, and nerve. Chase higher scores, master risky near-misses, and prove you’ve got the vision to survive the rush.

name: Misery Nights
summary: Co-op horror for 1–6 players. Complete high-risk tasks in a vast shopping mall while evading relentless monsters. Hold the security room - or push out and make it back alive.

name: Coco Block
summary: Coconuts drop from above – click to block them before they bonk your monkeys. Bananas fall too – let the monkeys eat them for points and combos. The longer you keep the monkeys safe and feed them bananas, the faster the coconuts fall. How high can you score?

name: Nullis
summary: Logic puzzle game where you must destroy paths of 0-s from the board. Use logic to complete levels with optimal solutions.

name: Suitcase Stories
summary: Suitcase Stories is a short, cozy puzzle game about packing life’s memories. Organize objects into suitcases across 7 chapters, from childhood to adulthood. No timers, no scores just the calm joy of finding the perfect fit for every cherished memento.

name: Myth Monkey Card
summary: A unique blend of Texas Hold'em poker mechanics and Roguelike strategy. Forge your destiny across four distinct cultivation paths and challenge the gods of the Celestial Court. Will you master Artefacts for precise combos, or rely on the Self for a desperate comeback? In this mythic battle where the world is your card table, victory is yours to define.

name: Bililitz
summary: Bililitz is a vertical roguelike with procedurally generated worlds. Explore mysterious depths, collect items, and discover portals to new challenges. Compete in the global ranking system to prove your skill and reach the top!

name: Snack Escort
summary: Who would’ve thought that a roguelike, card game, and tower defence could come together over a basket of food? Travel through magical lands filled with hungry creatures, collect cards and artifacts that shape your strategy with every run. Escort your food through this whimsical fantasy world.

name: A Color Theory
summary: A Trippy Puzzle-Platformer That Literally Plays with Color

name: Little Fiefdom: Medieval
summary: A medieval sandbox build/war game. Start as a peasant, become a lord, manage your fiefdom. Gather resources, construct buildings, train people & an army to defend or attack.

name: Quest-Top
summary: Step into the role of a Guild Master! Recruit adventurers, send them on quests to collect resources, upgrade your hideout, and enhance their gear — all while you work, watch videos, or play other games.

name: Floral Fury Online
summary: Unleash nature's wrath in Floral Fury Online, an Indie Action MMORPG. Master a unique Fusion system, conquer procedural dungeons, and battle epic bosses with dynamic combat. Forge your legacy, join guilds, and dominate the economy in a world where weather dictates the tide of battle.

name: The Subject: Protocol Zero
summary: Turn on your camera. The Kessler Foundation is paying for your pain. The game uses your webcam and microphone, turning the room into a lab. Complete four stages: from the blink ban to the "Green Light, Red Light" game. Money or sanity? Be the first to complete Protocol Zero. If you dare.

name: Thelma Fantastic
summary: Thelma Fantastic is a hidden object mystery game where every level and every hidden object is randomized. It is a game of finding objects, earning clues, and eliminating suspects to solve the case. An endless supply of randomly generated hidden object scenes for you to enjoy.

name: Dicement
summary: Dicement is a minimalistic logic puzzle game where your move, modify and manipulate dices to fit them in corresponding slots with different conditions.

name: Mochiko the Samurai
summary: This sword was forged to sever the past. As Mochiko, a lone female samurai, battle demons and powerful bosses across many worlds. Behind their rage lies a sorrowful truth. Handcrafted by a solo developer, this small indie game carries the weight of every slash—and a story that stays with you.

name: Unsealed: The Mare
summary:
Unsealed: The Mare is a first-person psychological horror game set in a nightmare rooted in memory and trauma.

Players explore dark, oppressive environments while uncovering fragmented messages and hidden memories that subtly alter the world around them.

The experience emphasizes tension, sound awareness, and atmosphere, encouraging players to move carefully, listen closely, and piece together meaning through environmental storytelling.

name: Void Reforest
summary: A 2.5D puzzle-platformer where almost all technology has gained consciousness and taken control. You play as a robot in a post-apocalyptic future, exploring neo-fictional environments in search of the last hope for survival.

name: Smashometry
summary: Smashometry is a neon-soaked, three-button reflex score-attack game. Hit matching shapes, survive escalating speed, stack insane combos, and climb global leaderboards as the screen erupts with colour and an electrifying original soundtrack.

name: Villa Nocturne
summary: In a mansion shrouded in mist, face the ghosts of the past. With puzzles, exploration, and moments of sheer terror, Villa Nocturne awaits.

name: Servo
summary: Take control of Servo — a high-speed drone. Chain boosts & switch gravity. Ricochet with precision and use momentum to survive in a chaotic world.

name: Battle Hanafuda
summary: A strategic two-player card battle based on the traditional Japanese game Hanafuda. Learn as you play and enjoy thrilling “Koi-Koi” duels filled with risk and reward.

name: Oeuf
summary: 3D physics-platformer where you are an egg! Roll, hop and slide your way back home.

name: Wild Tower
summary: "Wild Tower" is a Three Kingdoms-themed top-down combat game with Souls-like and light Rogue elements. Enter the tower to explore the unknown, face challenges, and experience combat.

name: Dead Beyond
summary: Dead Beyond is an action packed survival game where you are trapped in a house full of zombies and challenging traps to overcome.

name: Nightmarena
summary: Nightmarena is a 2D rogue lite turn based fighting game. Carefully analyze enemy attack pattern to figure out the best time and direction to dodge and then fight back with your own skills. After every arena attempt, improve your character and keep fighting until you conquer all the floors.

name: Nitro Turtles
summary: Nitro Turtles is a racing game about super fast turtles! Reach insane speeds with awesome shell-attached gadgets, compete in crazy races with friends, and sprint across the finish line to claim ultimate turtle victory! To be the fastest turtle around, you'll need to master shell gadget usage, learn every shortcut imaginable, and maybe even consider using performance-enhancing seaweed!

name: Police Chase Simulator: Highway Racers Pursuit
summary: Get ready for thrilling chases and intense moments in Police Pursuit Highway Cop Patrol Interceptor— a game where law and order clash with crime! Become part of an elite police unit and dive into a world filled with adrenaline, speed, and mind-blowing maneuvers.

name: Orbloom
summary: Take deckbuilding and replace the cards with ball physics so you can combine abilities in creative ways!

name: Ranger’s Path: National Park Simulator
summary: Begin your park ranger journey in Ranger’s Path: National Park Simulator. Maintain trails, assist visitors, check permits and respond to emergencies. Explore diverse biomes and observe varied animal behaviors across a wide range of species.

name: Hunter's Seal
summary: Manage the front desk of a fantasy hunters guild. Identify monsters, verify hunters, and authorize them! The guild's reputation is in your hands.

name: Galactic Vault
summary: Build your weapon to its full potential in Galactic Vault, a fast-paced FPS roguelite. Discover endless upgrade combinations, craft diverse builds, and unleash devastating abilities. Get ready to infiltrate high-security vaults and recover lost tech.

name: Art-Therapy: Jigsaw Puzzle
summary: A Cozy Jigsaw Puzzle Game for Everyone! If you like puzzles, this one’s for you. It has over 100 beautiful pictures in different styles—some colorful and fun, others peaceful and calming. There’s no rush, no timers, just a simple and relaxing way to spend your time.

name: Shift 0
summary: Co-op for 2–4 players. Carry fully physics-based objects, complete tasks, and move up floor by floor, but don’t forget that time is limited. Your internship ends with either a job offer or a full reset.

name: Crabmeat
summary: A short first-person-point-and-click-survival-horror game set in a future Antarctic fisheries region where you are a prisoner tasked with crabbing for the priceless southern King Crab.

name: SoulWander
summary: Soul Wander is a moving journey to restore lost colors and light to a dark world. Can you find the light in this darkness? Each region has its own story. Grow stronger with weapons and soul powers. Your choices shape the world’s fate. Begin your quest to reclaim lost colors now!

name: The Artifactory
summary: The Artifactory is a chaotic couch co-op party game set in a whimsical fantasy lootbox factory! Craft potions, forge weapons, and experiment with recipes to fulfill unpredictable orders. Fix broken machines, survive moving platforms, lava, and more! Play solo or with up to 4 players!
