summary: Fight, Scavenge, and Extract in The Midnight Walkers, a hardcore FPS game with deadly zombies, dangerous players, and valuable loot. Craft weapons, armor, and consumables; trade items; and maintain your hideout. Escape Liberty Grand Center mega complex, and thrive...or die and lose everything.

name: 5omeday
summary: You have been assigned to guard a dragon girl set to be executed at the end of 5 days and have the ability to kill her instantly at any time with the push of a button in this multi-ending visual novel.

name: Disgaea Mayhem
summary:
Disgaea Mayhem is a brand-new 3D action RPG from an all-star team consisting of director Shunsuke Minowa, character designer Takehito Harada, and composer Tenpei Sato.

In this game, players will be able to experience the exhilaration of defeating enemies with overwhelming power that defies convention—unleashing flashy techniques with simple controls, completionist elements like leveling characters up to 9,999 and “reincarnating” them to grow even stronger, and developing overpowered stats that let them deal over a billion damage.

name: Space Warlord Baby Trading Simulator
summary: Buy low, sell high, and short an entire universe of babies in this arcade stock market sim set in the world of Space Warlord Organ Trading Simulator.

name: Folklore Hunter
summary: You are a hunter world reknowned for slaying supernatural beasts. Your next contract is to hunt down a wendigo plaguing a section of woods in north america. Gather resources, set traps, prepare your equipment, use your hunters instincts and take down the beast, before it hunts you.

name: The Red Pearls of Borneo
summary:
The Red Pearls of Borneo is a detective mystery deduction game inspired by Type Help, Return of the Obra Dinn and The Case of the Golden Idol.

You are a clairvoyant investigator in 1948 London, exploring the psychic echoes of a tragedy that occurred eight years prior on a remote plantation in Borneo.

name: Kuky Adventure
summary: Help Kuky, a curious character who gets lost in the Candy World and must travel through colorful environments to find the way back home. Along the journey, collect candies and face strange sugar-made enemies such as marshmallows, cookies, and other living, dangerous sweets.

name: Starsand Island
summary: Leave the hustle of the city behind and embrace life on Starsand Island. Fish, farm, raise animals, and befriend or fall in love with locals to learn their secrets. Customize your world with our DIY system, and invite friends to help build your dream paradise!

name: Pure Pool Pro
summary: Welcome to Pure Pool Pro; the ultimate pool simulation. Play solo or online, master every game type, and compete in high-stakes tournaments in immersive venues. Experience breathtaking 8K native visuals, lifelike physics, and pinpoint-precise controls.

name: Final Payload
summary: Final Payload is a fast-paced 2D action game where you control a guided warhead. Manage inertia and fuel, destroy enemies, avoid guarded zones, and land precisely to complete missions.

name: High on Life 2
summary: An intergalactic conspiracy threatens the fate of humanity! Team up with a wide cast of talking alien guns as you shoot, stab, and skate your way through the exotic locales to take down the bad guys and save your favorite species (humans)!

name: RD Racing
summary:
RD Racing is a casual combat racing game where speed and firepower decide who survives. Compete in intense top-down races, destroy rival drivers, earn cash, and upgrade your vehicle to dominate the competition.

Inspired by the classic Death Rally game, the game brings back the thrill of arcade vehicular combat — but with a modern twist and colorful 3D cartoon-style graphics. Fast races, explosive weapons, and strategic upgrades create a chaotic and addictive gameplay loop.

Win races. Eliminate opponents. Build the ultimate combat machine.

name: Norse: Oath of Blood
summary:
Norse is a turn-based tactics and combat game for PC and console. Set against the rich backdrop of the Viking Age, join Gunnar, a young warrior, on a relentless quest for revenge across the rugged landscapes of Norway.

Build a thriving settlement, govern your community, forge alliances, grow strong, and win the favour of the gods. For this is a time when legends are forged in the fires of conflict, and only the brave are remembered.

Written by prize-winning and Sunday Times bestselling author Giles Kristian, Norse is set in a fully realised historical world, driven by a compelling narrative and brimming with memorable characters.

name: Fur Squadron Phoenix
summary: Embark on an action-packed adventure in this on-rails space shooter. As a trainee pilot, you will fight in strange virtual worlds. Master your ship, upgrade your skills and protect the federation from an imminent threat. Are you up for the challenge?

name: Harvest Cafe
summary: Explore, grow, repair and cook delicious food! Harvest Cafe combines an open-world adventure with a restaurant business simulation, giving you the opportunity to enjoy farm life.

name: Demon Tides
summary: Explore the open seas and uncover the kingdom's dark secrets as you expressively platform your way across dozens of locales, upgrading your gear every step of the way!

name: Manairons
summary: Manairons is a 3D action platformer game inspired by the legends of little creatures living in the Pyrenees. Help Nai face off against the landowner who has taken control of a charming village using the power of the "canut," with magic, flute, and plenty of chaos.

name: Gear.Club Unlimited 3
summary: The Gear.Club series is back! Customize and set up your favourite cars to race at top speed along the roads of the French Mediterranean coast and Japan. Don't just win – show off your style!

name: Ultrapool
summary: The pool bar is always open! Ultrapool is a colorful roguelike about playing pool with a bunch of wacky balls with crazy effects. Carefully craft a perfect build and get the craziest trickshots!

name: Fixer Undercover
summary: Welcome to DIY Espionage - a VR puzzle adventure where everyday tools and found objects become your problem-solving kit. Go undercover as a repair worker inside a prison, investigate a mysterious rehabilitation program through various challenges, and make your escape with the truth.

name: The Legend of Khiimori
summary: The Legend of Khiimori is a system-driven game where you explore the untamed land of 13th century Mongolia as a brave courier rider. Breed and train horses with specialized abilities to explore every aspect of this diverse and fascinating landscape.

name: Homura Hime
summary: "Homura Hime" is a third person action game, featuring Japanese anime visuals and intense 3D bullet curtain gameplay. Alongside Homurahime, fight against Demon Girls possessed by deviant "emotions", and get closer to discovering the truth of not only the fallen, but also your own veiled legacy.

name: iRacing Arcade
summary: Race across global licensed series and build your own racing team to secure your motorsport legacy in this third person arcade racer.

name: Fumpers 2: Dual Realms
summary: Fumpers 2 delivers a chaotic platforming experience that tests your reflexes and patience. Stay alert through physics-based gameplay, surprising obstacles, and challenging levels. Don’t fall. Don’t quit.

name: Rager
summary: Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-fueled excitement of this melee combat rhythm game! Master weapon of your choice – sword, mace, claws, hammer, axe, your own fists and many more! Stunning visuals and spatial audio technology puts you right in heart of the action.

name: No Vacation for an Executioner
summary: It's a a Dark Fantasy Action-RPG about a frustrated executioner in late 17th century. He ran away from the gallows. It aroused a riot of monsters, he had to clean up this cruel mess, and find out the truth of this crazy world.

name: Nothing Beyond This Point
summary: In the Void, everyone is alone, and you're no exception. Use your health as damage, create your own character with abilities and Sigils, and fight through corrupted souls in this top-down action Metroidvania. Don't be fooled - you're nobody's last hope.

name: Pakinpaks
summary: A cozy puzzle game where you go on a journey all around the world packing and organizing all sorts of travel gear. Fulfill your client's request in any way you wish and — as long as everything fits — prepare the neatest bags that you can!

name: Journey of the Garden Rose
summary: Lily must explore a fantastic palace and contest with the machinations of a cruel prince to rescue her mother in this Old-School 3D Action-Adventure game!

name: To Be a Millionaire
summary: Ordinary people can also become millionaires. In the game, you can get money by transporting apples. Once you have accumulated a certain amount of money, you can own your own barbecue restaurant. From then on, becoming a millionaire is no longer a dream.

name: Violet Impetus
summary: Violet Impetus is a bullet-hell arcade melee 'em up set in a series of (lightly) procedurally-generated arenas. Drop into different biomes to rid the world of Æris—the demiurge, petrificate & fractured. Its other children just won't see things eye to eye.

name: Incremental Ragebait
summary: Incremental Ragebait is the journey of Demon Incrementus to ragebait god! Buy new weapons, unlock upgrades, and build a purgatory to automate the ragebaiting process.

name: Melody Friends
summary: Just drop in your favorite song—done! A cute rhythm game that auto-generates multiple difficulties. Play comfortably with any key and clear a song your way with five friends.

name: Detective 26
summary: DETECTIVE 26 is a relaxing, turn-based mystery board game for 5-minute investigations. Roll dice and traverse low-poly maps to gather clues. Use logic to unmask the Wanted before turns run out! Level up your rank, unlock new content, and master the art of being a true detective!

name: Stickman Physics Battle Arena
summary: Level up and unlock the ultimate weapons in a bloody physics playground! You must kill countless enemies to increase your stats and become the greatest warrior. Dual wield over 75 unique and fun weapons in 7 different modes across nearly 100 different levels with up to 2 players in co-op or VS.

name: Final Stand Waves
summary: Defend your tower against endless hordes of zombies in this 2D top-down game.

name: The Mystical Traveler
summary: Play as a mysterious green cube and rise from the depths of a ruined world. Master your jumps, survive traps, and purify a dying ecosystem in this 2D platformer.

name: Rank: Warmaster Bunker Buster
summary: Rank Warmaster: Bunker Buster meets tactical control with strategic execution, bringing RTS elements to this sci-fi, action tower defense. Acquire resources as you further secure your bunker strategically placing perimeters and defensive and offensive units.

name: Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy
summary:
A new Dissidia story unfolds in modern Tokyo, where legendary Final Fantasy warriors assemble to save the world from destruction.
Defeat the boss faster than the enemy team in exhilarating, action-packed battles in this 3v3 Team Boss Battle Arena.

name: Mask of Soul
summary: Mask of Soul is a 2D Metroidvania action-adventure where you play as Cheong-O Chasa, the underworld’s gatekeeper, hunting spirits released under the Red Moon. Master precise parry combat, switch between spirit masks, and explore a dark fantasy world inspired by Korean mythology.

name: Brighter Days
summary: Fight difficult enemies, explore dangerous locations, and gain strength in this hand crafted world to defeat the evil that lays waste to these Scarred Lands.

name: Genji Reincarnation: The Seven Mysteries of Shirahata High
summary: Friendship or fate—what will they choose? A karmic and occult visual novel where urban legends blur the line between life, death, and reincarnation.

name: Farming Simulator 25: Vredo Pack
summary: Counter grassland degradation with technology from Vredo, the renowned specialist in overseeding and self-propelled slurry injection vehicles. In the meantime, wild boars have been set loose to roam the land and threaten the health of crops. Includes 12 new machines, also featuring Evers Agro.

name: Overpowered 2: Crux of Fate
summary: Press your luck to its absolute limits as you fight for survival in a deadly monster arena!

name: Oops! Inc. Emergency Center
summary: Run the galaxy’s most chaotic hospital in Oops! Inc. Emergency Center! Play as a diploma-free robot doctor, diagnose bizarre space illnesses, craft the right remedies, and treat patients fast before insurance turns you into a fridge. Funny, frantic, and out of this world!

name: Roombattle
summary:
Roombattle is a party fighting game where players will control robotic vacuum cleaners and will fight equipped with sharp objects and balloons. The main objective is to be the last to be equipped balloons in the game. In addition to the battles, the game contains a large crowd of minigames.

Meet up with your friends, customize your vacuum, and get ready to battle in different rooms to claim victory!

name: Shinonome Abyss: The Maiden Exorcist
summary: The main character is a shrine maiden named "Yono," who has to survive in a haunted houses where Mononoke (yokai and vengeful spirits) lurk, using a limited number of items and traps in this strategy roguelike horror action game!

name: Damon and Baby
summary: An exciting new style of action adventure fusing shooting action with exploration.

name: Coincidences?
summary: After a sudden rent hike, you move into a suspiciously cheap house deep in the woods. The price is absurdly low and there’s work nearby—it seems like a stroke of luck. But you soon realize something is seriously wrong with the place...

name: Lofi Mahjong
summary: Dive into a calm, cozy world with Lofi Mahjong. Enjoy classic Mahjong Solitaire enhanced by a lofi soundscape for maximum focus and minimum stress.

name: Reconquista
summary: A fast-paced dungeon boomer shooter with melee combat, magic, and seed-based generated levels.

name: Mushi
summary: Welcome to Mushi! The next-gen Auto-RPG set in a rich fantasy world. This is a feature-packed incremental idle game, meaning that it mostly plays on its own. Your hero will automatically defeat enemies and level up on your screen while you do other things. Begin your rise from level 1 today!

name: The V Anomaly
summary: The V Anomaly is an atmospheric observation game where small changes matter. Search each room for anomalies and choose the correct exit: progress deeper as the Area number climbs or make one wrong call and return to Area 0. Stay sharp. Doubt everything.

name: Honkai: Star Rail - Unraveled for Daybreak
summary:
Version 4.1 of Honkai: Star Rail, which includes:
• New character: Ashveil
• New Trailblaze Mission: "Unraveled for Daybreak"
• New events
• ...and more!

name: Cookie Run: OvenSmash
summary:
️The Cookies have gathered in Platter City for the fight of their lives
Three factions... three goals... What could they be fighting for?

Get ready for the urban fantasy Cookie battle of your dreams!
Tune into the fight narrated by your new idol, DJ Miya!
It's time to fight, win, and make your dreams come true!

name: Call of Dookie
summary: Imagine you went to the crapper, and emerged an hour later to a monster apocalypse! Retro first-person shooter action inspired by 90's classics! Old-school local deathmatch & co-op for up to 4 players!

name: Copa City
summary: Organize high-stakes football events in the first football tycoon! Get the urban space and the stadium ready, ensure safety, and provide fans with an amazing football fiesta! But stay alert: Your decisions will not only influence the city but also the emotional rollercoaster for football fans!

name: Rubber Sharks
summary: Plunge into the tranquil existence of the sweet poolside life with the amazing company of peaceful Rubber Sharks. This adventure invites you to revel in the bliss of your cherished poolside sanctuary. But could there be a mystery hidden in this peaceful scene, or even more?

name: Project Songbird
summary: Project Songbird is a cinematic first-person narrative horror game set in the Appalachian forest. Take on the role of Dakota, a musician who must record their new album in a remote log cabin amidst a writer's block. Take caution, however. These woods were never empty...

name: Devils on the Moon Pinball
summary: Themed on the astrologically Occult, Devils on the Moon is a Single board VG-Pinball Heavily inspired by all the great Pinball games of the past and some modern ones as well.

name: Screamer
summary: High-octane action and anime aesthetics collide in this arcade racing game, featuring fighting mechanics and a storyline that hits hard. In this world, some race for glory while others seek power or revenge. Every race is a fight and every battle is personal.

name: VMX
summary: VMX offers an authentic riding experience with gesture-based tricks and responsive bike handling. Take on challenges in carefully crafted skateparks and dirt tracks, customize your bike with a realistic spray-painting system, and express your style through a variety of outfits.

name: Curse Warrior
summary:
Curse Warrior is a dungeon crawler RPG where you explore and conquer the underground labyrinth “Eclipse,” filled with curses.

In the dungeon, your party members may become cursed through various actions.

Since curses alter the abilities and actions of your party members, players must constantly monitor the state of their party and make crucial decisions on how to proceed. Build stronger characters while managing and adjusting the effects of curses to successfully clear the dungeon.

name: EverSiege: Untold Ages
summary: Liberate Bastion, humanity’s last refuge. Defend against evil hordes, reclaim lost powers, rebuild ancient ruins, and adapt your tactics to break the everSiege. A top-down action-strategy rogue-lite where choices shape every run, playable solo or up to 3 players in co-op.

name: Chico's Rebound
summary: A mysterious tower full of challenges has appeared. Launch Chico's walnut up at the blocks to break them all! Dash, dive, and tail-whip, while deploying an arsenal of creative power-ups. In between stages explore the Celestial Tower to solve puzzles, earn rewards, and uncover its secrets!

name: Nutmeg!
summary: NUTMEG! is a nostalgic football manager game with a deckbuilding twist, set in the '80s and '90s. Relive the days when the tackles were as hard as the mullets were long and football was about football.

name: Living Dead House
summary: Living Dead House delivers a pulse pounding, classic arcade experience. Battle through waves of the undead solo or team up with a friend. Use an arsenal of weapons and survival items to outlast the night. Will you escape alive and claim your top spot on the leaderboard?

name: GridBeat!
summary: Dungeons! Danger! Rhythm Action! You just hacked into the biggest corporation in the world and stole an unfeasibly valuable amount of data, but getting in was the easy part. To get back out you’ll need to explore the Mainframe, solve puzzles, battle security programs… and do it all on the beat!

name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park
summary: More experiences are coming to the Flower Kingdom! Enjoy a variety of attractions in the Bellabel Park plaza that lets you team up with (or work against) friends and family. Collect the most coins, run and hide in Phanto Tag, work together to pass a Bob-omb to the goal and more! This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition adds even more content and enhancements as well.

name: Icarus: Console Edition
summary: Land on Icarus, a planet broken due to failed terraforming. Once meant to be humanity’s second home, it is now a hostile frontier of toxic skies, savage wildlife, and relentless storms. Every drop from orbit is a fight for survival. Build shelter, craft weapons, hunt for food, and seek your fortune in exotic matter.

name: Etrange Overlord
summary: Join Étrange on this musical odyssey as she seeks to conquer hell in the pursuit of living her best afterlife.

name: Before Exit: Gas Station - Daylight DLC
summary: In the Daylight DLC, the perspective shifts to the gas station employee’s wife as she searches for her missing husband. Across seven days of investigation, you explore the station in daylight, documenting supernatural anomalies through photography to progress the new investigation-focused mode. Missing any key detail forces you to restart the inquiry. The DLC presents unexplained events that challenge logic, revealing the story from a new viewpoint and uncovering what truly happened to your husband.

name: Sweet Starlight Sisters
summary: “Sweet Starlight Sisters” is a character-raising romance adventure where you share a sweet life under one roof with the bunny-girl sisters Anya and Sanya. Train the duo with your own hands to become top performers, and—while occasionally fielding their heart-pounding advances—lead them to victory.

name: Taito Milestones 4
summary:
The 80s were a simpler and more colorful time. Especially in the arcades! With the Taito Milestones 4 collection, you can transport yourself back to the era of hairspray, neon, and pixels, and experience ten games from a variety of genres. Whether you enjoy sports, martial arts, platformers, shoot 'em ups, or even blocks and balls, you’re guaranteed to find something magical here.

WATER SKI
Released: 1983
Control a water skier being pulled by a motorboat while avoiding obstacles. Jump to dodge small obstacles, and hit a jump ramp to earn points! Just beware of the shark...

FIELD DAY
Released: 1984
This colorful sports festival includes seven unique games, such as three-legged race and tug-of-war. Up to four players can join, with two players competing in each match. Who will be the ultimate victor?

TYPHOON GAL
Released: 1985
Wear down your opponent’s stamina with punches and kicks, then finish them off with big techniques like the shoulder throw or brain buster! It’s a fight for the ages!

ARKANOID
Released: 1986
The classic block-breaking game! Arkanoid is easy to understand yet hard to master. Use the paddle-like craft Vaus to bounce balls, destroy blocks, and defeat the boss DOH! Elegant, simple and totally addictive!

BONZE ADVENTURE
Released: 1988
Yokai time! Two Buddhist priests must fight snakes, giant eyeballs, ghosts, spiders, and more to exorcise the evil from Enma, the king of the underworld. Too scared to go alone? Ask a friend to play with you!

KURI KINTON
Released: 1988
You are the master martial artist Kinton! Kick and punch your way through hordes of thugs to rescue an intelligence officer of the WSPO (World Shadow Police Organisation) and his daughter. Failure is not an option!

SYVALION
Released: 1988
Pilot the golden dragon-shaped mecha Syvalion to thwart Earth’s invasion by a mysterious army. The storyline changes dramatically with each playthrough, featuring over 100 different ending!

DON DOKO DON
Released: 1989
Join lumberjacks Bob and Jim as they set out to rescue the kidnapped king and princess of Marry Land. Use their trusty mallets to defeat any enemies standing in their way!

CAMELTRY
Released: 1990
Rotate the screen to guide a ball to the goal! Press the shake button to make the ball jump, and hold it to increase rolling speed. Can you get through the mazes in time for a high score?

THE NINJA KIDS
Released: 1990
When a peaceful town of puppets is overrun by a cult seeking to resurrect a demon, four ninja puppets take up the fight. This unique action fest supports up to four players at the same time!

name: Weed Supermarket Simulator
summary: Grow weed and grow your business! Run your own weed supermarket, manage stock, set prices, and help customers. Try new strains, choose the best products, upgrade your shop, and keep your store running smoothly so people always come back.

name: Neopets: Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey
summary: Journey back to Neopia with 26 classic games, brought back to life for new and returning fans!

name: Life is Strange: Reunion
summary: Life is Strange: Reunion is the thrilling finale to the Max and Chloe saga, a chapter that brings their book to a close. This is a full circle moment for both developers and fans—one that builds on everything that has come before. And even as the game delivers a reunion long-thought impossible, it also caps off our time at Caledon University in a literal blaze of glory.

name: Dwarf Guild Mania
summary: Lead your capitalist dwarves across new lands in search of gems and gold. Each game brings a unique experience in this procedural turn-based strategy. You must vanquish your enemies, prospect for gems, construct mines, dispatch spies, and risk it all. For the Guild!

name: Diceaster
summary:
I made this game with one clear idea:

See how far you can go before you give up.

You control a die. Each face represents one available hit. Every time you launch yourself, you lose a face. As long as you still have faces, you have control, precision, and the ability to correct mistakes.

When you run out of hits, the die stops being a die. It turns into a ball and starts rolling. Rolling is not an advantage: it’s an alternative. A risky option that can help you move forward… or wipe out all your progress in seconds.

Each level reduces the number of hits available. The challenge is reaching just as far with fewer resources.

You will fall. A lot.

You will climb… sometimes.

And if you reach the top, there will be proof that you were there.

name: GwenBlade Witcheresque
summary: Hack and slash your way through depression in lightning-paced Soulslike to find a way to finally move on from loss in real life

name: Karigurashi Renai: Living on Borrowed Love
summary: Welcome back to your childhood town! The Full HD Remaster of Karigurashi Ren’ai: Living on Borrowed Love perfectly preserves ASa Project's signature blend of comedy and heartwarming charm while offering a stunning new visual experience.

name: Michael Test
summary: Michael Test is a point-and-click adventure game where you uncover hidden truths within classical paintings and follow faint traces of sound to deduce and choose the final ‘sin.’

name: Commie Block
summary: Survive as the newly appointed manager in an expanding communistic regime where our purpose is to produce more and more resources for the glory of motherland! Manage the workforce & optimize output of buildings to survive against unrealistic demands as long as possible in our own commie block

name: Is Zombody Home?
summary: Upgrade the house, customize the weapon and charge the special attacks, your cute zombie horde is about to attack.

name: Cards Lie
summary: Unmask the demons. Trust no one. You’ve gathered the entire village for a midnight ritual. Among them hide creatures of pure evil — demons disguised as villagers.

name: Blastroid
summary: Blastroid is an arcade-style roguelite set in space. Players customize their ships by combining different engine and weapon systems, striving to survive against ever-evolving threats in regions swarming with enemy waves.

name: BasketBlow
summary: Play tabletop basketball with realistic physics in relaxing environments. Compete in customizable leagues and cups, edit your teams, and complete your trophy room. Collect points to unlock courts, balls, and environments. Play with friends locally or online.

name: Rocky Idle
summary: Rocky Idle is a single-player idle/incremental game. Level up your skills, gather resources, and craft powerful combat gear to defeat the strongest bosses and complete your collection log.

name: Otome Daoshi Fighting For Love
summary: Welcome to Kayu, where every citizen, both man and woman, young and old alike, enjoy martial arts. Living in that kingdom as a Daoist priestess in training, you made your way to the Tournament of Valor to root for your childhood friend.

name: Tiny Misery
summary: A sick mother and her young son move into the home of a lonely old woman. A tragic story inspired by the dark puppet animations of the 80s and 90s.

name: The Knights of the Cross
summary: The Knights of the Cross is an RPG card game adapted from The Knights of the Cross by Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz. You will play as the knight Zbyszko and embark on a medieval adventure.

name: Vanishing Starlight
summary: Vanishing Starlight is a horizontal action adventure game similar to the Metroidvania. You will play the role of a prisoner who has lost his memory, wading into the sea of ​​stars, traversing rivers and mountains, embarking on a journey in search of memories, old friends and your own destiny.

name: CyberPunk Sex Tower
summary: The world of the future, modern technologies make it possible to create a super realistic sexual experience ...

name: Farming Sweeper
summary: Build, manage and grow your farm in a unique way: Solving puzzles with traditional minesweeper mechanics and managing your business finances in a relaxing game with great replay factor.

name: The Host: Cataclysm
summary: After a Post-Armageddon event the world has gone back to its roots living in simpler times, back to swords, kings, and war. After the hero has chosen evil the world is left in ruins as everyone struggles to survive in this new found world.

name: Who Are You!?
summary: Who Are You!? is a sci-fi psychological horror experience based on real UFO research. The story centers on Ray Roswell and his internal fight to understand the disappearance of his wife, which may involve an alien abduction.

name: The Hungry Town
summary:
The Hungry Town is an interactive visual novel in a dark fantasy setting with vampires.
You are a young vampire who has been drawn into a violent confrontation between two generations of vampires. You will have to choose a side or decide to stay true to yourself.

name: Project Chameleon
summary: Project Chameleon is a stealth game where you must shape-shift into objects to go unnoticed by your enemies. Play as Siren, an elite spy executing missions around the globe. Manipulate your surroundings, set traps, and use powerful gadgets in each mission.

name: The Wide Open Sky Is Running Out of Catfish
summary: A story-driven photography game... on the back of a giant, flying catfish. Transform clouds into sea creatures and bring abundance back to an empty sky.

name: Theralite
summary: A turn based Sci-fi Roguelike where players explore the deep mines on a distant planet, find/trade equipment, battle monsters and try to survive.

name: Somniora: Chapter 1
summary: Somniora is a horror-puzzle game. Get ready to delve into the adventure of our character, who is trapped amidst strange dreams, while searching for answers to the questions lurking in their subconscious.

name: Flora Corner
summary: Flora Corner is a cozy idle game about growing houseplants and decorating your living space.

name: Dictocracy
summary: Take charge as the President of a newly independent country, Adelphia. Build infrastructure, approve policies, juggle between conflicting priorities of the public, your ministers and other countries' leaders - All with only one action per turn and a different political landscape in each playthrough

name: Infinite Cards
summary: Discover infinite cards in this roguelike deckbuilder. Every card is unique, every run a new experience. Craft, combine, and build your deck completely freely to defeat enemies and bosses, or take on cleverly designed puzzle challenges!

name: Don't Fall
summary: Will you manage to reach the summit? In this challenging 3D platformer, roll, jump, and climb through levels filled with obstacles and traps across diverse biomes. A precision challenge where every move counts as you navigate increasingly complex worlds.

name: Mega Man Star Force: Legacy Collection
summary: The Mega Man Star Force series, which expanded into an anime, is back in the Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection! This collection includes seven games and additional features like a gallery of illustrations and music! Online play is also supported!

name: The Cubes
summary: The Cubes is a colorful puzzle adventure where you control four unique cubes to solve spatial challenges. Switch between the cubes, activate buttons, overcome spikes, collect coins and solve puzzles in a relaxing yet brain-teasing experience.

name: Island of Hearts
summary: After a rough breakup, you do what any reasonable person would: run away to a remote tropical island full of beautiful strangers. There, you’ll meet six captivating women, each with her own charm, secrets, and questionable taste in men. Your choices decide who you love, lose, or accidentally ghost.

name: ChloroLink
summary: In ChloroLink, a cute and cozy management game, guide Lux the plant of life as she spreads her rootweave to connect charming plants. Use each plant’s growth pattern to explore, reinforce the links between plants, overcome gentle challenges, and help Lux bloom the world back to life!

name: Eastern Era
summary: To escape from pursuit, as the leader of your sect, guide your disciples to rise again! Engage in farming and hunting, train in martial arts, and forge weapons and armor. Build your sect's base and fortifications from the ground up to survive in this perilous, ambition-filled martial world!

name: Riruka ha Ikue ni Yoru wo Irodoru
summary:
"I have other personalities," said the girl on the night they first met.

Her eyes were serious, pointed at the self-professed detective Shiraishi Naoya, who lit a cigarette with a skeptical look on his face. Indeed, at first he didn't believe her - there couldn't exist many personalities within one body.

The overfamiliar and cheeky Nanase, with a penchant for overt physical intimacy.
The prudish but naive Senri, who gets easily flustered.
The calm and collected Kanna, who always keeps her composure.
And the one who Naoya met first - the pure and honest Riruka, who has a streak of shyness.

They met in the rain at night, and as if by fate, Naoya ended up bringing the "girls" home with him.

She's a girl with multiple souls, and each personality has a wish of her own - each wish so strong that a personality was born to fulfill it.

What awaits at the end, when all her wishes are fulfilled?

name: AI Limit: Eirene's Furnace of War
summary: Continue the story beyond the ending of AI LIMIT. After the fall of the Church, embark on a new journey into the Northern Parish. Step into the domain of Eirene, the Warfare Bishop, and face a new trial within the Furnace Arena, where long-forgotten myths of Havenswell rise once again.

name: Echoes Untold
summary: Echoes Untold is a wordless, space-brutalist adventure where a lone female traveler explores a realm shaped by time distortion, hidden timelines, and ancient philosophical atmosphere. Players unlock unique movement abilities, solve environmental puzzles, and uncover the truth behind the Void.

name: Forever With You
summary: Finding love isn't always easy. Within a limited time, manage your life and find someone you truly love.

name: Tasogare no Shape Shifter
summary:
“I’ll become your ideal girlfriend. So please, just give me one more chance.”

The one who appeared before Hiroto Takenouchi saying that was Chise Koumoto, his clingy ex-girlfriend whom he should have broken up with yesterday… or rather, something else wearing her form.
Calling herself Eiko, her true nature is that of a shapeshifter: a shadowy aberration that devours other beings and blends into human society by mimicking them.
Though she has taken Chise into herself, Eiko claims she hasn’t absorbed her completely, instead keeping her inside. She makes a demand:
“I don’t care if it’s only for a limited time. I want to live as your girlfriend. If you do that, I’ll safely release Chise.”

And so begins a temporary, make-believe romantic relationship born from that promise. Yet once they actually start dating, Eiko turns out to be even more in sync with him than Chise ever was.
Through his interactions with Eiko, Hiroto’s exhausted heart is soothed, and he begins to remember what it feels like to like someone, to feel fulfilled by it.

But precisely because of that, there will come a day when he must face it.
The truth that the girl before him is an inhuman being, living by principles different from those of humans.
And the fresh yet bitter memories that have shaped Hiroto into who he is…

name: Ama Nee: Osananajimi Onee-chan to no Echi Echi Amayakasare Dousei Seikatsu
Alastrius
summary: In this explosive on-the-rails shooter pilot powerful Star-Fighters and wage a vast interstellar war. Chart your own course across a galaxy of exotic sci-fi worlds as you carve a path to the Capital. Lay waste to hordes of enemy ships and bring down ruthless bosses. You are the Republics last hope!

name: Roof Leak Hero
summary: Keep things from flooding as long as possible and get the highest score! Throw your containers and make trick shots to land them directly where you need them to be. Dump excess water into the drain and advance to the next point level to get point multipliers and reach even crazier scores!

name: Chained Wheels
summary: Embark on a chaotic co-op drive in Chained Wheels, where two vehicles are chained together and every move turns into a shared adventure or a DISASTER.

name: Noneday
summary: Grab your notebook and get ready to explore every nook and cranny of the surreal, esoteric adventure game Noneday! Search dreams for clues, solve puzzles, and unlock the secrets hiding within Bow’s own mind.

name: Idle Demon Summoner
summary: A dark yet vibrant idle game featuring creature collecting, tower-defense, and bullet-heaven elements. Unlock new demons and weapons to conquer distant worlds.

name: Farming With Lasers
summary: Incinerate various pests with your giant laser, as you grow your farm. Purchase incremental upgrades to expedite the process.

name: Moving Day: Make It Home
summary: Turn empty houses into cozy homes at your own pace. Complete gentle client requests, unlock items for Sandbox Mode, and capture your finished designs in Camera Mode.

name: Don’t Turn off the Light
summary: Don't Turn Off the Light is a 5-player asymmetrical multiplayer horror game where one player becomes a demon lurking in the darkness. Survivors must rely on light, teamwork, and scavenged weapon parts to avoid possession, escape captivity, and fight back before it's too late.

name: Trushybin & Removin: What I Couldn’t Delete
summary: A cozy and emotive 3D platformer about two tiny PC icons who, with innocence and love, accompany their owner on a journey of emotional healing and memories.

name: Afterdepth
summary: Explore, build, and survive in the depths of a forgotten world. Manage oxygen, power, and resources as you uncover the secrets buried beneath the surface.

name: Anything Simulator
summary: A powerful 2D sandbox simulator — physics and magic, characters and animation. Create anything you can imagine!

name: My Egg Girls: A Gentle Story
summary: A 100-day cohabitation romance you’ll wish would never end. Your choices sway emotions, shaping reactions and the ending in this emotional growth ADV.

name: Princess of Worlds End
summary: A dark fantasy visual novel about a girl named Princess who, through a strange series of events, unlocks a new power that changes her life forever. Guide Princess to help her get her life together, manage her relationships, her addiction and, most importantly, prevent the end of the world!

name: Crispy Kart
summary: Crispy Kart is a pixel-style survivor-like game where players take the wheel of a kart made of cookies and desserts, battling through waves of enemy vehicles to survive—all while uncovering the sinister group sabotaging the races.

name: IncreKnight
summary: A short incremental game about a knight slaying a dragon.

name: Marvel MaXimum Collection
summary:
Marvel MaXimum Collection is a compilation that will feature the following Marvel games from the 1990s: X-Men: The Arcade Game, Spider-Man/X-Men: Arcade's Revenge, Captain America and the Avengers, Spider-Man/Venom: Maximum Carnage, Venom/Spider-Man: Separation Anxiety, and Silver Surfer.

The compilation will feature save state and rewind, display options, and a music player to listen to the songs from the games.

name: Build A Bank Tycoon
summary: Ready to get rich?

name: Hyouhon Hako de Uka wo Matsu
summary: A romance between an unidentified human-plant and an human(?) girl, both of them trapped in a cage.

name: Baseball Scouter
summary: You awaken as the manager of the league's worst team, burdened by the disastrous legacy of your predecessor. Your only edge is a secret ability: to see the hidden baseball potential in anyone. Scout overlooked talent, rebuild the roster, and uncover the truth behind the team's ruin.

name: Legends of Wasteland
summary: Legends of Wastelands is an idle RPG where you shape your hero's growth. Choose among six classes, master 100+ skills, and combine talents and gems for unique synergies. Idle for rewards or dive into boss fights and shifting wastelands, with pets and gear adding endless build variety.

name: Shiny Recollection: First Step
summary: A doujin dating-sim set in the Idolmaster Shiny Colors universe, which will let you romance Meguru, Kogane, Juri, Rinze and Chiyuki.

name: Operation Terra
summary: Lead mankind to its new Earth in this science fiction First Person Shooter/Role Playing Game. Grab your gear and fight through hordes of hideous robots, droids and machines. Loot credits and power ups. Complete missions to unlock permanent bonuses. With procedurally generated levels and maps.

name: Gobocore
summary: Roguelite Turn Based Auto-Battler about little goblins rescuing their kidnapped tribe members. Smash. Evolve. Survive.

name: Puzzle Spy International
summary: Pursue a ring of diamond thieves and their trail of cryptic puzzles in this ‘60s spy adventure. As Agent Epsilon you’ll choose your path as you chat with (or chat up!) suspicious contacts. Decode cryptograms, decipher clues and deduce answers as you solve wordplay & logic puzzles across the globe!

name: Buckle Up
summary: Buckle Up! is a chaotic 2–6 player party shooter where every round is a new mess. Battle friends across fast-paced gamemodes, upgrade weapons, fight to grab the most points, and show off your style with fun character customization.

name: Hozy
summary: Transform abandoned spaces into cozy havens in Hozy!

name: Sacrificio
summary: An intense and fast-paced survival horror shooter in a dark fantasy world. Face overwhelming odds in a brutal struggle against evil.

name: HyperTyper 2000
summary: Type, dodge, parry, and survive in HyperTyper 2000! A hybrid typing/bullet hell game where both halves of the action are nonstop! Test your typing skills with one hand and dodge with the other.

name: Cubin II
summary: Cubin II is a first-person puzzle-platformer game that re-immerses you in the LGA experience. Complete the story by solving these 50 new experiments to finally escape from this terrible place.

name: Quintillion Quest
summary: A fantasy-themed run-based active incremental game

name: Fate Architect
summary: Fate Architect is a roguelike deckbuilder where you build and modify symbols on a slot machine to earn points and shape your strategy. Each run offers new combinations, synergies, and challenges as you design the ultimate slot machine of fate.

name: Towerlings
summary: Watch autonomous adventurers climb a 100-floor tower while you guide their fate through strategic intervention. No direct control — only decisions. Choose when to summon, strengthen, or protect, and decide whether to build an army or raise a few elite heroes.

name: Hong Huang Evolution
summary: A top-down lightweight Rogue-like survivor game where players take on the role of a beast capable of evolving multiple times to fend off hordes of enemies. Choose from various evolution paths, talents, and skills build, survive against all odds, and ultimately evolve into the ultimate life form.

name: Gear Slots
summary: Spin the wheels of weaponry to incrementally upgrade your gear while endless monsters are defeated by your idle attacks. Watch your hoard of coins grow and find new ways to spend them to tip the scales of luck in your favor.

name: Barking from the Dark
summary: Barking from the Dark is a first-person horror game about a lonely night shift worker at a remote railway crossing.

name: Last Man Sitting
summary: A bunch of dudes sit in an office, all of them wearing black suits and white collared shirts. Everyone sits in the same lime green swivel chairs. For a video game, Last Man Sitting sounds really boring. Add shotguns and ragdoll physics, though, and you have a recipe for the only battle royale game left to make.

name: Mike Goes on Hike
summary: Become a real tourist in Mike Goes on Hike! Amazing wild landscapes, inexpressible atmosphere of hiking and important vital lessons are waiting for you. Go all the way to the end to fulfill the request of your beloved grandfather.

name: Elementallis
summary: Top-down action adventure with elemental magic gameplay. Guilt pushes you on a journey to restore the elements in a pre-apocalyptic world. Use and combine your elemental powers to fight and solve puzzles across the temples.

name: Dewdrop Dynasty
summary: Run, dash, and crawl your way through a fast, Metroidvania. Battle with giant bosses, find new guns and abilities, meet quirky characters, and most importantly find your way home.

name: Parkour Bot
summary: Parkour Bot is a fast paced, rhythm based, physics platform game, with an unique movement set of main character. Show your skills and get a lot of achievements in 100 dynamic levels.

name: Dono's Tale
summary: Relive the glory days of the 16 and 32-bit era in Dono's Tale. A super cute and colorful platformer about a hungry little dragon! Jump, dash, climb, and shoot your way through detailed and colorful worlds in order to get back your precious fruit!

name: The Swordfish: Knight of the Deep
summary: Embark on an epic adventure as a sword-wielding fish and restore order to the kingdom's depths. Explore an ocean world full of adorable characters, menacing foes, and hidden wonders.

name: Smipat and the Lost Bones
summary: In Smipat and the Lost Bones you follow the life of Smipat, a necromancer's pet with a will of it's own. Smipat has lost some of it's bones and is going on an adventure to find them. Each bone has it's own unique ability that makes it possible to overcome the challenges ahead.

name: The Wolf Is Dead
summary: Detective work is never easy. When the body of Alexander Wolff is found face down in the pool at a party for the film about his life, there's only one man (well, Fox) for the job. Interrogate suspects, investigate the scene of the crime and reach back in time with your partner, Maxwell Mirror.

name: Concerto on White
summary: Rhythm Action? No, this is MUSICIAN SIMULATION! Concerto on White is a musician simulation game featuring classical music. Unlike any typical rhythm games, players are required to actually play the main melody. In the main story, you will experience adventurous campus life in the academy.

name: High Elo Girls
summary: High Elo Girls is a Visual Novel set in the esports scene where you play as the latest recruit for a new all-girls team. Can you help your squad achieve their true potential, or will you only squander your own?

name: Demon Spore
summary: Blast your way out of tentacle hell as a failed lab experiment gives birth to a rapidly growing viral horror in this intense action rogue-lite inspired by 80s Monster movies. Use the lab to your advantage and improvise an escape plan before this constantly evolving life form spreads out of control.

name: Rise of the Robots X
summary: Rise of the Robots X (RoRx) is an online futuristic card-based strategy game played on a hexagonal grid battleground. Played on a hexagonal grid battleground, each game is an opportunity to refine your army and get better Robots, Buildings or Masteries!

name: Breadskate
summary: BRDSKT (BREADSKATE) is a freeroam skating game but you play as bread and ducks with guns have invaded your world. Simply give your newly baken bread loafs some wheels and watch them go skating and exploring the world. Truly the miracle of life of bread!

name: SUMBR
summary:
A 2-8 Player Arena Shooter filled with chaos.

Ascend into a 300 year intergalactic war between the 7 factions of humanity. Fight against all fronts and reunite the First Kingdom, as a Bellator of The King's Guard. Discover high tech weaponry, bionic augments and artifacts of a Pinnacle Era in the sci-fi Co-op, PvP, PvE world of SUMBR.

Venture into war-torn faction territories of the solar system, clear Heroic missions, and battle against other players in a variety of PvP modes, either solo or with friends.

name: Dino Tales
summary:
Dino Tales is a colourful adventure game where players explore a world of dinosaurs and interactive stories.

Create your own story from your adventures, discover prehistoric creatures, and unlock new tales as you explore exciting environments filled with puzzles, characters, and surprises.

Perfect for younger players and families, Dino Tales combines exploration, storytelling, and playful discovery in a friendly prehistoric world.

name: Little Nemo and the Guardians of Slumberland
summary: Explore a dream world as Little Nemo, armed with toys, candy, and stuffed animals in this colorful platforming metroidvania adventure.

name: Interwoven
summary: Welcome to Interwoven - a compact, but dynamic adventure inspired by traditional turn-based JRPGs! Follow an unlikely trio on their journey up to defeat the Obsidian Drake atop Anvite Mountain. Use the unique Augment Battle System to create all sorts of interesting strategies.

name: Flesh Everest
summary: Explore a randomized facility built within a massive living mountain of flesh. Flesh Everest mixes a rogue-like survival experience with shooting mechanics inspired by Silent Hill and Resident Evil. Death is permanent and ammo is limited.

name: Glaciered
summary: Glaciered is an action-adventure indie game that takes place on a glacier-covered Earth 65 million years in the future. Play as a Tuai, a species evolved from birds, to soar through the seas and fight against the threats to this new golden age of life.

name: King's Reign
summary: Become a King of the mystical and mysterious land of Thalendaar. Rule a magical Kingdom by indirectly influencing your people's actions. Expand your cities, gather resources, and protect your citizens from mystical monsters in this lighthearted strategy game.

name: Bangkok Story: A Stray Dog
summary: A top-down 2D story-driven adventure game inspired by real-life events. Traverse and experience the life of a formerly homeless man through an interview of how he regained his sense of self by telling his past to a stray dog. Set in Bangkok, Thailand 2017.

name: Eagle Knight Paradox
summary: Eagle knight paradox takes you (the player) into a doble experience, one of them is the role of a powerful mecha trying to protect a space city from space fanatics. On the other hand, the game sets you as the role of Ian (the pilot) building relationships around the city or whats left of it.

name: Epsylon
summary: A private eye mystery game where you decide how to solve the case. Use your detective skills to solve the case or rely on the abilities of your little dragon partner to see things from a new angle.

name: Witches Tavern
summary: Witch Tavern is a simulated business game that integrates tavern management, cosplay, love development and other elements. As the new boss of the witch tavern, you will meet all kinds of friends in this magical city of Venesia and start a full and extraordinary life.

name: NecroTactics
summary: An auto-battler roguelite with tower defense and horde survival elements. Draft and position your army, develop your graveyard, equip units with powerful items, cast spells, and place turrets to annihilate your opponent's army in seconds!

name: Anomalistic Revolution
summary: You stand before a pit at the city's heart, then your gaze drifts to a deeper void, one you fear even more. Wield your invention to unravel mysteries, reclaim lost memories, strengthen your skills, and battle nightmare-born horrors in this multi-ending RPG.

name: Subliminal
summary: Subliminal is a psychological horror game inspired by the urban legend of The Backrooms. Bleeding-edge lighting and rendering, handcrafted open-ended levels, light and perspective-based puzzles, nostalgic spaces, unfamiliar faces, and a rotting feeling that something is not quite right.

name: Slipgate
summary: Explore a gloomy rooms of damned sci-fi base as a doomed marine, only survivor of the portal experiment. Save humanity like in 90's with your trusty shotgun, paving a way through ominous corridors inhabited by the shadows of sinners and evil spirits.

name: Solaro
summary: Solaro is a handcrafted open-world game set in the remote outskirts of an ancient galaxy. Follow a lone traveller on an interstellar journey, solving puzzles, probing planets, and recovering lost fragments of the past.

name: One Card One Shot: Mafia
summary: Enter the world of the mafia, with an agile and dynamic Card Game that will challenge you in your free moments or addict you for hours! Choose a mission and hit the target in seconds! What awaits you with each card turned over? Will you become the legend feared by all or will you fall into oblivion?

name: TouHou: Legend of Fairy Souls
summary: “TouHou: Legend of Fairy Souls” is a TouHou fan game.In the game, because of someone's conspiracy, Reimu turned into Kedama and caused her power to weaken.Reimu then had to embark on an adventure to recover herself and finally uncover who was behind the scenes.

name: Montaro 2
summary: Montaro, master of stealth, sneakily infiltrating a convenience store with nobody being none the wiser. A stealth puzzle game where you manipulate objects and NPCs to complete objectives, "stealing pantsu".

name: It Consumes
summary: It Consumes is a roguelite arena-FPS in the dark. See by beating your heart and kill demons shrouded in shadows. Upgrade your abilities, unlock new weapons, and conquer what lurks in the darkness.

name: Timeless Rain
summary: Explore this foreign world and use manipulate time to defeat any creature who dares to stand between you and your goal! Meet the inhabitants of this strange realm as they push you towards finding the Timeless Rain...

name: Whispers of the Luminaries
summary:
Whispers of the Luminaries is an idol-themed murder mystery visual novel where you balance social life with detective work.

Investigate, obtain clues and deduce the killer.

name: Breathedge 2
summary: Sent on a reckless mission, you find yourself in outer space filled with numerous dangers and things to explore. Build, craft, manage your crew, look after the chicken, and defeat the evil space corporation in this new breathtaking survival game.

name: The Posthumous Investigation
summary: Travel to a noir Rio de Janeiro in 1937 and investigate the mystery behind the murder of Bras Cubas, the famed character created by Machado de Assis. Until the truth is out, you'll be trapped in a time loop, amidst a plot full of conspiracy and treason.

name: Saddle Up and Drive: El Contrabandista
summary: Saddle Up & Drive is a top down car game. Gotta hustle and rustle up some cash. Get involved in shady business with underground stills, land an honest job or race in the County Competition! Every day's a fresh start, and a new job awaits ya!

name: The Ripe Blood Anthology: This World Is Just for the Two of Us
summary: Take on the role of Derek — the police chief in a small town. Make decisions that will change the course of the story. Unravel the mystery behind the peculiar behavior of Derek's boyfriend, Chris, and his younger sister. The graphic style is inspired by bara-manga and colorful line art.

name: Monke Simulator
summary: Peel banan, escape containment and shower your oppressors in stench. Top the scoreboards, be the fastest ape and liquefy your neurons in this stink infused parkour shooter.

name: Sylvana's Chronicles
summary: A turn-based strategy game with roguelike and deck-building elements. Explore a dark and magical world full of forgotten lands, monsters, and secrets. Build your own deck of cards to fight your way through the dungeons. Upgrade your cards, unlock new items, and discover ancient artifacts.

name: Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together
summary: Cooking Simulator is back – bigger, better, and with optional multiplayer! Create your own recipes and take advantage of new and improved controls to become the best restaurant cook in the city! Or just have fun and enjoy cooking at your own pace. You’re the chef here!

name: Frame of Mind: A game of Thoughts
summary: Frame of Mind is a brief and cozy narrative game that lets you discover a character trough thoughts and mementos they find while moving out of their parents home. It's an introspective game, meant to share some experiences a peer-group of neurodivergent queers, including the developer, had growing up.

name: Grime II
summary: Become the stealer of forms in GRIME II, a surreal action-adventure metroidvania. launch tendrils made of hands to absorb foes and summon molds in their shape, as you explore a bizarre lived-in-world obsessed with art.

name: Memento Dawn
summary: A colorful puzzle game that follows a lost child on a journey to search for her memories and helps her through the darkness by controlling light and shadow.

name: KnockedDown
summary: Race as a cop, take down criminals in this thrilling low-poly game. Fast action, challenging obstacles. Join the chase!

name: Oni Hunters
summary: Journey through Gironia's lands, where monsters roam and secrets await. Battle, fuse creatures, and decide your fate in the grand Monster Jubilee. Ready for the adventure?

name: The Chronos Event
summary: The Chronos Event is a fast-paced third-person shooter that emphasizes the tactics of time travel and fast, aggressive play. Players rewind time, battling alongside their younger selves against overwhelming opposition.

name: KilaFlow
summary: Play as the mascot of a blazing fast (for it's time) antivirus software to clear out corruptions and viruses from various devices around a town.

name: House 2
summary:
As a terrible storm approaches, two young girls spend a fateful night watching TV and playing games…

House 2 is the sequel to the hit indie horror game, House. In House 2, you play as Tabby & Melody, finally free from their cursed home, in the next chapter of the House saga.

name: Roll The Bones
summary: Select spell-dice for your loadout, roll them and wreak absolute havoc! This high-paced pixelart roguelite will let you build unique loadouts with extremely interactable spells. Let's roll some bones!

name: Flow of War
summary: A classic RTS game that features auto-micro workers and warriors, freeing you to focus on your base defense strategy with a variety of towers and walls. Craft an army with MOBA-like heroes and units to counter your enemies' strengths and secure victory on stunning procedurally generated maps.

name: Vangaro Tactics
summary: Command colorful troops into tactical turn-based battles in Vangaro Tactics! Infiltrate enemy outposts on the Stealth Missions: mine, recruit, move wisely, and you'll stand a chance. Know your commanders and exclusive units to make the most of each faction.

name: Ammossum
summary: Build an endlessly upgradable weapon! Evolve projectiles into unstoppable firepower in this action roguelike. Fight through hordes of infected beasts, save your family, and feel the thrill of bloody shootouts filled with bullets, explosions, and acid. Can you survive the madness?

name: Teacher Seduction
summary: Math is such a boring thing... Unless you have a hot teacher! In this case, even her angry boyfriend might not be a big problem.

name: Sp(l/r)ite
summary: When you wake up, you are in a different space. "Sp(l/r)ite" is an adventure game in which you must cooperate with your neighbors and a vivacious goddess, separated by walls, to escape from a room floating in a different space, while solving riddles. Which door will you choose when you get there?

name: Ooga
summary: Help Ooga to retrieve his stolen food stockpile in this fast-paced, spear-based parkour platformer. Play the first world and a half in the free demo, secrets included!

name: Crown of Greed
summary: Ascend to the throne of Rodovia - a mystical realm inspired by Slavic mythology. Engage in an unusual, indirect management system in which you can't issue direct orders and must skillfully bend your subjects and heroes to your will. Perfect your ruling skills to build, expand and secure your legacy.

name: Lilac: Side Witch
summary: Visual novel adaptation of the stage play by Project Ricoro about an interspecies academy story between mages and humans that depicts the “ordinary” within the “extraordinary.” Side Witch is the version with an all-female cast.

name: The Last Winter Knight
summary: Haunt a suit of armour. Explore an abandoned castle. Recover your memories... and bring the ghosts of the past to rest in this melancholy visual novel about love, family and regret.

name: Bloody Shrine
summary: Complete the ritual and defend the shrine in this top-down arena shooter roguelite. Unlock new demons, discover new weapons and choose the right spells and items. Create hell-breaking synergies that will unleash pain and suffering on all ghoulies, elites and bosses.

name: isekizima: Ruins and Tails Journey
summary: This is an action game where you explore ruins buried in the forest with Ethnic BGM. Kijino, a cat-eared adventurer with two tails (Nekomata), goes on a journey around the ISEKIZIMA (Ruins Island of dreams and romance : as it was written in the tourist brochure).

name: Wildlife Rescue Simulator
summary: Get to the chopper and fly to isolated places to rescue terrified animals from man made disasters. Take photos of your adventures and share it with your loyal supporters to get donations. Upgrade your equipment in order to rescue even more animals.

name: Legends of the Round Table
summary: Lead the Knights of the Round Table through King Arthur's legend in a unique RPG, full of honor, magic and romance. Plunge into a colorful world inspired by medieval art, tales and music. Undertake perilous quests and fiercely defend your kingdom to make the flower of chivalry blossom again.

name: Dead Weight
summary: Challenge the Ancient Gods! Set the sails of your flying pirate ship and embark on the adventure in the steampunk world of Dead Weight. Explore floating islands in search for loot. Choose a class or create your own and enjoy turn-based tactical combat on tiny battlefields where every step matters.

name: Endurance Motorsport Series
summary: Manage the race from the stands, drive legendary cars and enjoy a genuine endurance race experience. As both driver and engineer, in this unique simulation victory can only come through teamwork.

name: Endless Tactics
summary: Endless Tactics is a turn-based roguelite game. Play as the commander of a high-risk planetary mining operation, defend your base from alien creatures while trying not to get overrun. Use resources to upgrade your starship, unlock new technologies, powerups, and deadly new worlds to harvest.

name: Synapse
summary: 「Synapse」is a game based on cooperative play with horror and thrills. Players must cooperate in a dark space to avoid robots, hack into facilities, and escape. The only thing players are given is a sense of helplessness and fear of death.

name: Eko And The Bewitched Lands
summary: "Eko and the Bewitched Lands" is a roguelite action RPG game. Help Eko on his mission to save the bewitched lands filled with enemies. Acquire and upgrade weapons of all kinds to combat and discover all the secrets that awaits for you.

name: Deflectorium
summary: Deflectorium: 2D sci-fi rogue-lite singleplayer. Deflect deadly shots back at your enemies to become unstoppable. With unique deflection system, you'll dominate battles while upgrading your skills and stats. Prepare for adrenaline experience where defense isn't just a tactic but an art.

name: Cheap Car Repair
summary: Cheap Car Repair - go back in time to Poland of the 90's. Run your own Cheap Car Repair shop. Look for savings wherever you can. Make lots of money and avoid angry customers!

name: Rune Defender
summary: Rune Defender is a grid based tower defense game. You build towers during the day and defend against the undead during the night.

name: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time
summary: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time is the last hour of a lost (nonexistent) JRPG, "remade” in 3D pixel art complete with director’s commentary, the digital manual, and archival footage.

name: A Ruthless World
summary: Embark on an adventure through a ruthless, 80s-inspired platformer world.

name: Jumpers' Mountain
summary: Join our little friends on this adventure, jumping between platforms to uncover the paths of 'Jumper's Mountain'. However, beware, as there are many secrets to reach the top, and a miscalculated jump can be quite costly.

name: Money Simulator
summary: Become a mogul in this thrilling simulation game! Buy, sell, and customize cars, trade in cryptocurrencies, and expand your empire with your very own shop. Take risks, make deals, and watch your business flourish in this dynamic world.

name: Codex: Eternal Eclipse
summary: Embark on a quirky adventure with four unique main characters as they seek their truth, battling gods, colossal corporations, and bizarre foes along the way. Unravel the mystery of the Eternal Eclipse and uncover the ancient secrets of the world!

name: PsychexFuse
summary: A lovingly hand-drawn adventure into esoteric worlds filled with threats, puzzles and horror. Help, save and clash with past versions of yourself, and unravel the mystery behind two and a half gods at war.

name: Scad
summary: Scad is an action packed roguelite apocalypse adventure. Fight against zombie hordes, craft & upgrade new weapons and prepare for new missions.

name: Effective Immediately
summary: All intergalactic travel passes through the orbital relay checkpoint. Verify ID discrepancies, repair vehicle systems and struggle against ethical dilemmas as you negotiate a shifting political landscape. Report for duty, effective immediately.

name: Nocturnal II
summary: Nocturnal 2 is an action-adventure game that lets you explore and rekindle the dark depths and towering heights of the city of Ytash.

name: Sauna Simulator
summary: Run your own sauna: buy a room, equip it with an oven and start earning money from it. Hire employees, ensure safety and, of course, have fun!

name: Whispers of The Shadow
summary: Detective Grace Lawson sets out immediately upon receiving a tip about her missing stepsister Amy, and when she gets there, she suddenly finds herself trapped inside the house. Now, Grace has only one goal: to find her missing sister and escape this nightmare.

name: ABYA: Paint Ball
summary: ABYA: Paint Ball is a challenging 2D platform action-shooter game. The robot ABYA awakens from a dormant pod, following the guidance of AI, wielding a specialized water gun to explore the complex and hazardous underworld for resources, enhance equipment, and open the central elevator.

name: Possible One: Lunar Industries
summary: Possible One is the ultimate colony management game set in space, and the only space-related RTS game based on proven or very feasible technologies, avoiding sci-fi.

name: Mörk Borg Heresy Supreme
summary: Mörk Borg Heresy Supreme is a doom-metal action RPG set in the world of Mörk Borg. Wretched antiheroes explore a side-scrolling, semi-procedural grimdark fantasy world, searching for a way to prevent the apocalypse or make the suffering worse.

name: Codebreakers VR
summary: Codebreakers is a chaotic VR Action Shooter that takes place in a dystopian future where various organizations are fighting for control of the world order.As a breaker, you will have to infiltrate, defeat enemies and avoid security systems to extract data.

name: Voice of Belldona
summary: Voice of Belldona weaves a story of swords, magic, and sci-fi! The game features roguelike decks, turn-based combat, JRPG elements, and customizable builds. Choose a character and combat style, explore randomly generated maps, power up your team, crush your enemies and... interact with a cute loli?

name: Exil
summary: A Mystical Anime-Inspired Metroidvania. Embark on an adventure through a mystical world full of magical creatures.

name: Söldner-X Complete Collection
summary: The Söldner-X Complete Collection is a compilation of two critically acclaimed shoot'em up games in one collection.

name: Pao Pao
summary: Pao Pao is a wild mix of culinary diving and animal madness—where you become the ultimate restaurant boss and management guru! Gather ingredients, go fishing, and expand your spot solo or with friends. Every order turns into an epic adventure… Jump in and experience it for yourself!

name: Fractured Worlds
summary: Fractured Worlds is a dark fantasy action RPG set in the shattered remnants of a ruined reality. Master weighty, precision-based combat, explore diverse realms, and face challenging bosses alone or together with other players of the realm

name: Moonsigil Atlas
summary: The deckbuilding roguelike with no energy – play cards using physical space! Slot cards together, manipulate the shape of your cards, and create overpowered combos to break the game!

name: Operatives: Revolve
summary: A cinematic roguelike deckbuilder where your cards are physically activated "Machines". Enemies can strike, pierce, or bomb them to pieces. Install multiple components to modify your cards, and set off cascading chain reactions to destroy your enemies.

name: Smash It Wild
summary: Smash It Wild is a tactical turn-based game combining volleyball and dodgeball in a fantasy universe. Upgrade your players and defeat your opponents in an intense roguelike competition!

name: Panzer Strike
summary: Authentic RTS gameplay straight out of the 2000s. Command your troops, develop strategies, and win World War II battles. Huge maps, thousands of units, long-range firepower, and no building mechanics!

name: Tombwater
summary: Explore the accursed Wild West town of Tombwater and lay bare the eldritch horrors that lie beneath. Survive blood-spilling combat in this gruesome 2D action-RPG that might just drive you to madness.

name: Adventurers Guild Inc.
summary: Adventurers Guild Inc. is a turn-based management game where you run the business behind the heroics! Hire staff, post quests, and fulfill adventurers' needs (while taking a cut). Manage your budget, grow your reputation, watch adventurers scramble and build the greatest guild of all!

name: Workaholic Simulator: Leaving the Dream
summary: NOT your typical simulator! Is it your dream job or are you just working in your dream? Work fast, or face the consequences. Workaholic Simulator: Leaving the Dream is a surreal and dark descent into human psyche, burnout and the horror of the working culture.

name: Net Raiders
summary: Net Raiders is a single-player game that combines RPG, deck-building, and roguelike elements. In order to survive the dangers of the ruined virtual world, you must synthesize the cards in your hand to find the best move and defeat the enemies you encounter!

name: Abashed
summary: Abashed is a 2.5D narrative-driven side-scrolling game that lets you explore the life of Issac, a man living with psychosis. One day waking up all alone, he sets out to find the truth behind his missing partner. On the way he finds himself needing to confront his deepest fears and the darkest secrets. Join Issac in this story of love, loss, fear, and acceptance. Reality is not what it seems.

name: Indoor Baseball
summary:
The highly anticipated follow up to Indoor Kickball!

Indoor Baseball is BIGGER, better, and even more destructive!

Indoor Baseball is a 1v1 baseball game played in the rooms of your house! Play in a goofy story mode to work your way up to make the school baseball team. Play a 14 game randomly generated season mode, or quick play 1v1 in a local multiplayer match against a friend or CPU.

name: Retro Game Store Simulator
summary: Build your own Video Game Store in 1984. Everyday until the end of 1989 gives you the opportunity to stock shelves, cycle your inventory, manage your prices, analyze historical trends to make your game store profitable. Use era-relevant technology and systems to prove that gaming has a future!

name: Festered
summary: Brave the terrors of a contaminated research facility, where every step could be your last. PSX style survival horror game.

name: Grex
summary: Play as a Swarm in GREX, a fast-paced incremental auto-shooter. Our body is our weapon. We die to evolve. We evolve to become The Monolith. WE ARE ONE. WE INVADE. THEY DIE.

name: Baptiste
summary:
Submerge yourself in a first-hand experience that will make you feel each chill as if it were real. The line between the game and reality blurs further with each step you take.

Explore a mansion where horror awaits in every shadow. The masterful dubbing and sound track will drag you to the depths of a nightmare. Darkness will become your most feared enemy, putting your bravery to the test in each corner.

Play as Tom, a young man still suffering from the tragedy. After the loss of his father, he accompanies his mother Sara on what ought to be a new beginning. However, the ghosts of the past threaten to consume him. Can you keep control against the siege of his inner demons?

Disentangle the gruesome secrets that impregnate each floorboard and each crack on the walls. Each discovery will reveal a story of pain and horror that beggars belief.

Submerge yourself into a world where beauty and terror coexist in a macabre dance. The visual design will transport you to a kingdom where the grotesque is fascinating.

Each objective, each note and each whisper contribute towards weaving the plot. Your perseverance in the face of fear will be rewarded with chilling revelations that will keep you on edge until the very end.

name: The Pet Squad
summary:
The Pet Squad is a 2D strategy and puzzle game with pixel art aesthetics, mainly inspired by Lemmings, that puts you in the role of a support operator.

The game is set in the not-too-distant future, where humans have managed to artificially evolve animals. The pet squad S.L.U. is an organization responsible for maintaining order between humans and the evolved animals, known as Animanos.

As an operator, you will have to support your squad at all times, guide them along the correct path, and protect them from enemies or themselves. To achieve this, you will have access to the most advanced technology, allowing you to teleport objects and even slow down time.

name: Last Drop
summary: Last Drop is a story you need to experience. Welcome to Nykylä Finland 1994. Seppo Sahtivaara and friends are waiting for you. This is an openworld action game with a story that has an impact. We bring back old good games and action from the best movies from that era. We want you to enjoy!

name: Intermundia: Dungeons, Polygons & Magic
summary: Intermundia: Dungeons, Polygons & Magic is an RPG with a deep turn-based combat system and a story filled with multiple choices and endings. Let yourself be carried away by this epic adventure: plan your moves, choose your destiny and be prepared to face the consequences!

name: Ahapika: Heroic Agency
summary: Gather brave heroes and open the most heroic agency in Ancient Greece! Help people, argue with the gods, but remember: a mistake can be fatal.

name: Gemmy's Adventure
summary: Simple but not easy! Gemmy's Adventure is a casual action game. All you need to do is move a mouse to reach the finish line without touching any traps, objects and walls. Levels get harder, requiring strategy to pass.

name: TouHou Koishi's Enchanted Woods
summary: 「TouHou Koishi's Enchanted Woods」 is a Touhou fangame.This is a "reverse-construction" action rogue-lite.Koishi vs. Kokoro! But as the playable character, Koishi uses various enhancement cards to continuously strengthen Kokoro. Can she ultimately defeat the Kokoro she has built up herself?

name: Settler's Domain
summary: Settler's Domain is a settlement-building game with citizen and resource management elements. Build structures, recruit settlers, gather resources, and explore your surroundings.

name: Hats and Guns
summary: Become a cardslinger in this roguelike deckbuilder with tactical elements. Fight, gather weapons and items, face unexpected events and upgrade your cards for hundreds of possibilities. Every run is unique and so are you, the best shot of the Far West looking for your upcoming revenge.

name: Exoshock
summary: Exoshock is a cooperative sci-fi PvE shooter that redefines VR combat with intense firefights, squad tactics, and dynamic battlefields.

name: Aether & Iron
summary: Immerse yourself in this narrative RPG set in an alternate 1930s where anti-gravitational technology has taken cars, roads, and even New York City into the sky. Muster a crew, master tactical, turn-based combat, and unravel the dark secrets lurking beneath the floating metropolis.

name: Kingdom Loop
summary: Kingdom Loop is a strategic roguelike autobattler focused on building your army and kingdom. Explore many tile combinations, items, and units in search of the perfect setup to beat the Ancient Kings!

name: Ghost Sector
summary: Ghost Sector is a survival horror game where you play as M-07, a prototype machine trapped in a cybernetic facility during lockdown. Outwit the automated defenses, search for answers to your origin uncovering secrets, solving puzzles, and upgrade your abilities while preserving your finite energy.

name: Ramen Shop Simulator
summary: Take control of your very own Ramen Shop! Transform a cozy, worn-out Japanese alley back into a vibrant hotspot. From scrubbing floors to cooking the perfect bowl of ramen. Decorate every corner, upgrade everything, and create your unique restaurant. The aroma of success is just a bowl away!

name: AstroScaper
summary: A minimalist puzzle city-builder where every placement counts. Build colonies on asteroids using strategic proximity-based mechanics and minimal resource management. Relax in freebuild mode or chase high scores in challenge mode – all against a serene cosmic backdrop.

name: Dwarf Legacy
summary: A challenging bullet-hell precision platformer. Climb up vertical dungeons of The Mountainhome, battling relentless swarms of enemies and navigating perilous traps. Uncover the secret of your lost legacy hidden atop the highest peak and secure the future of your village.

name: Wizard Hand
summary: A magical deckbuilder game where solitaire meets roguelike. Uncover dazzling combos and accumulate points with the help of enchantments, crafting, and a collection of powerful artifacts.

name: Fantasy World Manager
summary: Build a massive-scale MMO-themed fantasy world where you design all creatures, objects, quests, events and dungeons. Watch the inhabitants of your world embark on their adventures.

name: Scavland
summary: Scavland is a hardcore, top-down pixel art survival game set in a Post-Apocalyptic Soviet Era. Explore a world ravaged by war and the deadly Mist, scavenging for resources, taking risky jobs, and seeking refuge in harsh settlements. The wasteland is relentless—everything is out to kill you.
